**ZY**（2026-05-06 23:56）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session continues iterative UI refinement of `kucun.html` (庫存總覽) in the 培養液管理系統. The session covers v1.3.3 → v1.3.7 improvements.

**Round 1 (v1.3.4)**: User requested:
- Only show 7-8 date columns at once, rest behind scrollbar
- Move scrollbar to TOP of table (currently hard to find at bottom)
- Fix sticky header: disappears when scrolling down
- Status badges: remove "充足" and "無資料", only keep 注意/危急

**Round 2 (v1.3.5 attempt)**: User clarified:
- The problem is that ALL columns are being displayed at once, making the scrollbar useless
- "需要限縮它的寬度距離，捲軸才會出現" (need to constrain the width so the scrollbar appears)
- NOT about fixing individual column widths

**Round 3 (Critical clarification)**: User said:
- NOT a monitor resolution issue — they ZOOMED OUT Chrome to see everything
- 期間估計用量 should ALWAYS appear at the RIGHT EDGE of the viewport (sticky right) — but it doesn't
- Original design consensus: LEFT fixed columns + RIGHT fixed column + MIDDLE scrollable
- Asked whether this consensus has been achieved

**Approved final fix (v1.3.7)**:
- Give `.inv-wrap` `max-width:1300px` to force consistent horizontal overflow
- Give `.inv-wrap` `max-height:500px` (fixed, not viewport-relative) to force consistent vertical overflow
- Both changes ensure sticky behavior always triggers regardless of screen size or zoom

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- `position:sticky` behavior requires nearest scroll container ancestor (set by `overflow:auto/scroll/hidden`)
- `overflow:hidden` on ancestor (the white card) clips sticky elements that move outside ancestor bounds → caused header to become completely invisible in v1.3.5
- `overflow-y:clip` does not create a scroll container (unlike `overflow-y:auto/hidden`) — used to allow page-relative sticky, but was abandoned
- CSS sticky requires the element's container to actually OVERFLOW for sticky to trigger
- `width:100%` on table auto-fills the container width → table never overflows → no scrollbar → no sticky
- `width:max-content; min-width:100%` lets table take its natural width (wider than container when many event columns)
- Mirror scrollbar: a synchronized div above the table with `overflow-x:auto` showing the scrollbar at top
- Without `max-width` on `.inv-wrap`, the container inflates to full viewport, table always fits, ALL sticky behavior fails
- Corner sticky cells (intersection of row-sticky + col-sticky) need higher z-index (6) than regular headers (4)
- `table-layout:auto` (default): browser ignores `max-width` on `<th>` elements; explicit inline `width:80px` forces column widths

3. Files and Code Sections:

**`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (main file, v1.3.3 → v1.3.7 in progress)

Current CSS state (after latest edit, partial v1.3.7):
```css
/* Inventory table wrapper — KEY FIX */
.inv-wrap { overflow:auto; max-width:1300px; max-height:500px; border-radius:0 0 16px 16px; }

/* Table width — forces natural content width */
.inv-table { width:max-content; min-width:100%; border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; }

/* Sticky header row — relative to .inv-wrap container */
.inv-table th { position:sticky; top:0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; color:#64748B; letter-spacing:.05em; padding:10px 12px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:2px solid #E2E4F4; white-space:nowrap; z-index:4; }

/* Corner cells (both top-sticky AND left/right-sticky) need higher z-index */
.inv-table th.s0,.inv-table th.s1,.inv-table th.s2,.inv-table th.s3,.inv-table th.s4,.inv-table th.s-right { z-index:6; }

/* Top scrollbar mirror — STILL NEEDS max-width:1300px */
#inv-scroll-mirror { overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; height:14px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:1px solid #E2E4F4; }
#inv-scroll-mirror::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }
#inv-scroll-spacer { height:1px; }
```

Sticky column CSS (left side, 600px total):
```css
.inv-table th.s0,.inv-table td.s0 { position:sticky; left:0;     z-index:3; width:130px; min-width:130px; }
.inv-table th.s1,.inv-table td.s1 { position:sticky; left:130px; z-index:3; width:120px; min-width:120px; }
.inv-table th.s2,.inv-table td.s2 { position:sticky; left:250px; z-index:3; width:80px;  min-width:80px;  }
.inv-table th.s3,.inv-table td.s3 { position:sticky; left:330px; z-index:3; width:180px; min-width:180px; }
.inv-table th.s4,.inv-table td.s4 { position:sticky; left:510px; z-index:3; width:90px;  min-width:90px;  border-right:1.5px solid #E2E4F4; }
.inv-table th.s-right,.inv-table td.s-right { position:sticky; right:0; z-index:3; width:110px; min-width:110px; border-left:1.5px solid #E2E4F4; }
```

Status badge (simplified):
```javascript
function badgeHtml(status) {
  if (status === 'warn') return `<span class="badge b-warn">🟠 注意</span>`;
  if (status === 'crit') return `<span class="badge b-crit">🔴 危急</span>`;
  return '';
}
```

Event column header (inline width forces fixed-width columns):
```javascript
theadHtml += `<th class="cl-col-th" style="width:80px;min-width:80px;max-width:80px">
  <div class="font-bold text-slate-600">${M}/${D}</div>
  <span class="src-badge ${srcCls}" style="margin-top:2px;font-size:10px">${srcLbl}</span>
</th>`;
```

HTML structure (inside white card):
```html
<div class="md:hidden px-4 py-2 bg-amber-50 ...">左右滑動提示</div>
<div id="inv-scroll-mirror" class="hidden md:block"><div id="inv-scroll-spacer"></div></div>
<div class="inv-wrap" id="inv-wrap-inner">
  <table class="inv-table" id="inv-table">
    <thead><tr id="inv-thead-row"></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="inv-tbody"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

Mirror scrollbar sync JS:
```javascript
function initScrollSync() {
  const mirror = document.getElementById('inv-scroll-mirror');
  const wrap   = document.getElementById('inv-wrap-inner');
  const table  = document.getElementById('inv-table');
  if (!mirror || !wrap || !table) return;
  document.getElementById('inv-scroll-spacer').style.width = table.scrollWidth + 'px';
  mirror.onscroll = null; wrap.onscroll = null;
  mirror.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!mirror._lock) { wrap._lock=true; wrap.scrollLeft=mirror.scrollLeft; wrap._lock=false; } });
  wrap.addEventListener('scroll',   () => { if (!wrap._lock)   { mirror._lock=true; mirror.scrollLeft=wrap.scrollLeft; mirror._lock=false; } });
}
```

render() calls initScrollSync():
```javascript
function render() {
  ...
  if (hasAny) renderInventoryTable(cachedData);
  renderChangelog(cachedData);
  if (hasAny) initScrollSync();
}
```

**`C:\Users\User\.claude\plans\prd-beipan-html-gupan-html-order-html-j-vectorized-pancake.md`**
- Updated with Phase 3.5-R4 section documenting the v1.3.7 fix

4. Errors and Fixes:

**v1.3.5 Critical Bug — Header completely invisible**:
- Used `overflow-y:clip` + `position:sticky; top:56px`
- The card's `overflow:hidden` clips sticky elements that move outside the card's visual bounds when sticky activates relative to page
- Fix: Reverted to `overflow:auto` on `.inv-wrap` and `top:0` on `<th>` (sticky relative to container, not page)
- User: "全部都大錯特錯...表頭現在沒有正確顯示，而且無論我如何縮放螢幕，它都不會出現"

**Fundamental Design Misunderstanding — Root Cause of All Scroll Issues**:
- I repeatedly tried sticky/overflow-y approaches before identifying the core issue
- Root cause: no `max-width` on `.inv-wrap` → container inflates to full viewport → table always fits → no overflow → no scrollbar → no sticky
- Fix: `max-width:1300px` on `.inv-wrap`

**`max-height:calc(100vh - 240px)` too large on high-resolution screens**:
- On 1440p+ monitors, this could be 1200px+ which is larger than the product list height
- Fix: Changed to fixed `max-height:500px`

**HTML edit rejected mid-session**:
- User stopped an edit to the mirror scrollbar HTML to ask clarification about Issue 2C (the "3 瓶" display meaning)
- Had to re-apply the edit after clarification

**`old_string not found` error on lotsHtml edit**:
- After a rejected edit, file content didn't match expected string
- Fix: Re-read the file at the specific line range and used exact current content

5. Problem Solving:

**Horizontal scroll consistently present**: The core insight was that `max-width:1300px` on `.inv-wrap` means:
- Left sticky (600px) + visible event area (~590px = ~7 columns at 80px) + right sticky (110px) = 1300px total
- The table with 8+ event columns is always wider than 1300px → always overflows → scrollbar always appears
- This is viewport/zoom independent

**Right sticky column always visible**: With horizontal overflow guaranteed, `position:sticky; right:0` on 期間估計用量 works correctly — it always appears at the right edge of `.inv-wrap`

**Vertical sticky header**: With `max-height:500px` and 25+ products at ~40px/row = ~1000px of content > 500px → always overflow → `position:sticky; top:0` always sticks header at top of `.inv-wrap`

**Scrollbar position at top**: Mirror div (`#inv-scroll-mirror`, 14px high) placed above `.inv-wrap`, synced bidirectionally with JS. Both mirror and `.inv-wrap` need matching `max-width:1300px`.

**ZY**（2026-05-07 00:06）：

前三張圖是我試錯的結果。的確可能就像你說的，寬度是固定的，但它還是沒有符合我剛才的需求。

從下面更新紀錄的白框中，我得知這個白框也會隨著螢幕放大縮小而調整，但調整的幅度是有限的，這句話對不對？

第二個問題是，雖然我們限縮了寬度，但可以很明顯看到，右側「期間估計用量」的欄位並沒有貼著右邊，而是也被固定住了；它理應要貼著右邊才對。

接著，雖然我可以轉動捲軸，但感覺並沒有真正區分出左側、中間、右邊這三個明確的區塊。感覺部分內容有區別，但上面的標題卻沒有區別，導致捲軸的寬幅竟然從最左邊一直延伸到「期間估計用量」之前，有這麼長的 bar，但它其實應該只出現在中間才對。

所以我認為你並沒有明確地幫我切成三個部分：
1. 圖層關係
   如果存在上下層的關係，左側跟右側應該屬於上層圖層，中間則是下層圖層，這樣中間的部分在滾動時才會被遮住或擋住。
2. 切分方式
   我推測你並沒有真的把它切分成想像中的三個部分，或者標題與內容的切分方式有所差異，導致現在標題與內容的切分不一致。
3. 右側對齊
   右邊欄位其實不是貼著右邊，只是「看起來」在右邊，而不是「從右邊數過來」貼齊右側。

以上這些因素導致中間現在呈現很混亂的現象。你可以再告訴我，我說的對不對？我們可以再討論一下。

已讀完 CSS 結構。你說的三點**全部正確**，我來逐一確認，然後說明根本原因。

---

## 確認你的三個觀察

**第一點（白框跟著視窗調整）**：對。更新紀錄的白框是 `width:100%` 的容器，會隨視窗寬窄而伸縮。

---

**第二點（捲軸範圍太寬）**：對，而且更精確的說法是——因為現在是一張完整的 `<table>`，瀏覽器計算「可捲動範圍」時，把整張表從第一欄算到最後一欄。左側固定欄雖然視覺上不動，但它的寬度（600px）仍然計入捲軸的 track 長度。所以捲軸顯得特別長，這不是「看起來長」，是真的在追蹤錯誤的範圍。

---

**第三點（期間估計用量沒有真正貼右邊）**：對，而且找到真正的根本原因了。

目前的測試資料只有 4 個日期事件（5/1、5/3、5/6、5/8），4 欄 × 80px = 320px。加上左側 600px + 右側 110px，整張表只有 **1030px 寬**。但 `.inv-wrap` 的 `max-width` 設了 1300px，所以容器比表格更寬。

**表格沒有溢出容器 → 沒有捲軸 → `position:sticky; right:0` 根本不會觸發。**

那它為什麼「看起來在右邊」？因為它就是表格最後一欄，自然待在 1030px 的位置。但它不是「從右邊數 110px 固定住的」，只是剛好長在那裡。

---

## 根本問題

你說得非常準確：**我沒有真的切成三塊**。目前是用一張 `<table>` + CSS `position:sticky` 模擬出「看起來像三塊」的假象，但本質上它是一整體。這導致：

- 捲軸永遠追蹤全表寬度，無法只追蹤中間
- sticky 能不能觸發，取決於資料量（事件欄夠不夠多）
- 沒有圖層概念，左右欄無法真正「蓋在」中間上方

---

## 正確的做法：三個獨立容器

真正的修法是把 HTML 結構改成三個獨立的 `<div>`：

```
[左 div: 600px 固定][中 div: flex:1 獨立橫向捲動][右 div: 110px 固定]
```

- 左右各自是 `overflow:hidden`，不捲動
- 中間是 `overflow:auto`，有自己的捲軸（只覆蓋中間範圍）
- 縱向捲動：中間捲動時，JS 同步帶動左右 div 的 `scrollTop`
- 因為是三張獨立的 `<table>`，每行高度需要 JS 同步對齊

這是比較大的重構，但是徹底解決你說的三個問題。我把這個計畫整理進檔案，你確認後再開始執行。

**ZY**（2026-05-07 06:47）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

The user runs a 培養液管理系統 (culture medium management system) for an IVF laboratory. The main ongoing request is to fix `kucun.html` (inventory overview) so that:
- **Left 5 columns** (品項, 庫存/安全量, 狀態, 批號/效期, 待收貨) are always visible (sticky left)
- **Right column** (期間估計用量) is always at the right edge of the viewport, regardless of how many event columns are in the middle
- **Middle event columns** fill available space and show a horizontal scrollbar when there are too many columns to fit
- The **outer container is responsive** (stretches with screen width)
- There is **only one horizontal scrollbar** — no multiple vertical scrollbars

The user provided a screenshot of v1.4.0 with three major complaints:
1. Three separate vertical scrollbars (one per panel) appeared due to the three-panel layout
2. Row misalignment because `syncRowHeights()` measured DOM before rendering was complete
3. The responsive width of the changelog section was lost; period estimation column not visible without scrolling

User confirmed the assistant's analysis was correct and approved the new approach (single table + CSS sticky).

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- `position:sticky; left:Xpx` — requires cumulative left values for multiple sticky left columns; z-index:2 for tbody cells, z-index:4 for thead cells (highest priority)
- `position:sticky; right:0` — only triggers when table overflows the container; with `width:100%` on the table, when few event columns the table fills 100% → right column is naturally at the right edge without sticky triggering; when many event columns, table overflows → sticky activates
- `width:100%` on `#inv-table` — key insight that makes right sticky always appear at the right edge regardless of data volume
- `overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:auto; max-height:500px` on `.inv-wrap` — single scroll container
- Top mirror scrollbar (`.inv-mirror`) synchronized with `.inv-wrap` scrollLeft via JS
- `border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0` — required for sticky to work on table cells
- `z-index` hierarchy: normal `td` = auto, `th` (top sticky) = z-index:3, `td.sl/td.sr` = z-index:2, `th.sl/th.sr` (both sticky directions) = z-index:4
- Hover state for sticky cells: need explicit `#inv-table tbody tr:hover .sl { background:#FAFAFA; }` rule to override the `.sl { background:white; }` that provides scrolling cover

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** — main file, updated from v1.4.0 to v1.5.0

  **CSS (was lines 44-68, now replaced):**

  .inv-mirror::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }

  #inv-table tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom:none; }

  **`renderInventoryTable()` (was lines 787-914, now rewritten):**
  Key structure — builds one thead row and one set of tbody rows:
  ```javascript
  function renderInventoryTable(data) {
    productInfoCache = {};
    const products = getSortedProducts(data);
    const cols = buildChangelogCols(data.changelog);
    const lotToggleLabel = showAllLots ? '全部批' : '近兩批';
    const totalCols = 5 + cols.length + 1;

    // Single thead row with all columns
    let theadHtml = `
      <th class="sl sl-0" style="width:130px">品項</th>
      <th class="sl sl-1" style="width:120px">庫存 / 安全量</th>
      <th class="sl sl-2" style="width:80px">狀態</th>
      <th class="sl sl-3" style="width:180px">...</th>
      <th class="sl sl-4" style="width:90px">待收貨</th>
    `;
    // + event col headers (class="ev-col" or "year-sep")
    // + right col header (class="sr")
    document.getElementById('inv-thead').innerHTML = `<tr>${theadHtml}</tr>`;

    // tbody rows - each has all columns
    tbodyRows.push(`<tr>
      <td class="sl sl-0">...</td>
      <td class="sl sl-1">...</td>
      <td class="sl sl-2">...</td>
      <td class="sl sl-3">...</td>
      <td class="sl sl-4">...</td>
      ${midCells}
      <td class="sr" style="text-align:center;padding:10px 8px">${estCell}</td>
    </tr>`);

    // Group rows span all cols, sticky at left:0
    tbodyRows.push(`<tr class="group-row"><td colspan="${totalCols}" class="sl sl-0">${groupKey}</td></tr>`);

    document.getElementById('inv-tbody').innerHTML = tbodyRows.join('');
    requestAnimationFrame(initScrollSync);
  }
  ```

  **`syncRowHeights()` — deleted entirely** (was lines 1081-1101). No longer needed since single table has natural row height alignment.

  **`initScrollSync()` — simplified** (was lines 1103-1122):
  ```javascript
  function initScrollSync() {
    const mirror = document.getElementById('inv-mirror');
    const wrap   = document.getElementById('inv-wrap');
    const table  = document.getElementById('inv-table');
    if (!mirror || !wrap || !table) return;
    const spacer = document.getElementById('inv-spacer');
    if (spacer) spacer.style.width = table.scrollWidth + 'px';
    mirror._lock = false; wrap._lock = false;
    mirror.onscroll = null; wrap.onscroll = null;
    mirror.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      if (!mirror._lock) { wrap._lock = true; wrap.scrollLeft = mirror.scrollLeft; wrap._lock = false; }
    });
    wrap.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      if (!wrap._lock) { mirror._lock = true; mirror.scrollLeft = wrap.scrollLeft; mirror._lock = false; }
    });
  }
  ```

  **Version:** `v1.4.0` → `v1.5.0`

- **`C:\Users\User\.claude\plans\prd-beipan-html-gupan-html-order-html-j-vectorized-pancake.md`** — Plan file updated: Phase 3.5-R5 marked ✅ completed (with note that v1.4.0 had three-scrollbar problem), Phase 3.5-R6 added documenting the v1.5.0 single-table CSS sticky approach.

4. Errors and fixes:
- **v1.4.0 three-panel layout failures:**
  - Three separate `overflow` containers → each got its own vertical scrollbar (three scrollbars visible)
  - `syncRowHeights()` measured `offsetHeight` via JS before browser had finished rendering → row heights wrong → rows misaligned
  - Fixed in v1.5.0: abandoned three-panel entirely, back to single table

- **Previous v1.3.x single-table sticky failures (from prior sessions):**
  - `position:sticky; right:0` only triggers when table overflows its container
  - With `max-width:1300px` container and few event columns, table width < 1300px → no overflow → sticky-right never activated → right column not at the edge
  - Fixed in v1.5.0: use `width:100%` (not max-width) on the table. With `width:100%`, when there are few event columns, the table fills 100% of container width → right column is naturally at the right edge without needing sticky to trigger. When many event columns cause overflow → sticky-right activates normally.

5. Problem Solving:

**Root cause of all previous failures identified:** The core issue was that `position:sticky; right:0` is data-dependent — it only works when the table overflows its container. Previous versions used `max-width:1300px` which meant with 4 event columns (4×80=320px + 600px + 110px = 1030px < 1300px) there was no overflow and sticky-right never triggered. 

**Solution:** Use `width:100%` on `#inv-table`. This guarantees:
- Few event columns → table = 100% container → right column at natural right edge ✓
- Many event columns → min-widths force table to overflow → horizontal scroll appears → sticky-right activates ✓

**Additional problem solved:** Multiple sticky left columns require cumulative `left:` values (130px, 250px, 330px, 510px) rather than all being `left:0`. The z-index hierarchy (normal:auto, thead th:3, tbody sticky:2, thead sticky:4) prevents sticky cells from being covered by non-sticky content.

6. All user messages:
- [Screenshot of v1.4.0 with detailed feedback]: "雖然設計成三個表格，但上下捲軸應該要完全共用一個，不應該出現三個捲軸。我發現現在版面會對不上，導致我無法對應左側數值，表格看起來非常凌亂。關於更新紀錄的白色視窗，我曾說明過它應該要能隨著螢幕寬度做彈性調整... 目前的調整建議如下：1. 維持表格彈性...左側固定，右側則根據橫幅寬度保有彈性，且永遠靠向最右邊。2. 中間顯示區域：(a) 顯示寬度應隨螢幕大小調整... (b) 必須偵測數值顯示狀況，若內容被遮擋，應提供「橫向捲軸」... 還是這樣的表格呈現，對你或對我們來說，會顯得太亂或太難操作嗎？你有什麼優化的方式，可以達到我目前想要的目的嗎？你也可以說說看，你覺得我現在想要達到的目的是什麼？我們真的有共識嗎？"
- "好，你的理解正確。那麻煩你嘗試幫我做出我想要的樣子了，謝謝。" — Confirmed understanding is correct, asked to implement
- [Plan approved via ExitPlanMode] — User approved the Phase 3.5-R6 plan for v1.5.0 single-table CSS sticky approach

**ZY**（2026-05-10 10:08）：

請先了解一下我們的業務需求規格（PRD）與業務規則書，並瞭解目前在庫存頁面的調整與修改。

我在上一個對話框中有提到，目前有四個頁面無法進行更新，請你確認一下為什麼版面配置沒辦法呈現我們討論的樣子。

同時，我也尋求了其他人的協助，稍後會再放上一個新的圖示，並跟你說明我覺得可能的方法。請你看一下有哪些部分是已經達成或尚未達成的，我們再來討論。

「雙向固定標題（Two-way Sticky Header/Column）」。

簡單來說，你希望中間那一排日期：

垂直捲動時： 像膠水一樣黏在頂部（固定住）。

水平捲動時： 隨內容左右移動（以便查看不同日期的數據）。

1. 這辦得到嗎？會增加難度嗎？
完全辦得到！ 這在現代 CSS 佈局中其實是標準做法。
難度並不會顯著增加，但對程式碼的「層級（Z-index）」和「容器結構」要求會稍微精確一點。

其運作原理是利用 position: sticky 的特性：

左側固定欄位： 設定 left: 0。

右側固定欄位： 設定 right: 0。

頂部日期標題： 設定 top: 0。

交集處（左上角與右上角的格子）： 同時設定 top: 0 與 left: 0（或 right: 0），讓它們在雙向捲動時都保持不動。

2. 精確的 AI 提示詞 (Prompt) 建議
雖然之前的提示詞已經包含大框架，但針對你特別強調的「中間日期標題要垂直固定、水平連動」，建議使用以下更精確的版本。這能讓 AI 寫出更正確的 CSS 結構。

請將以下這段話直接提供給 AI：

我需要製作一個複雜的資料表格，請使用 HTML 和 純 CSS (position: sticky) 實現，需求如下：

結構佈局： 表格分為左側固定區、中間時間軸滾動區、右側固定區。

雙向固定需求 (Sticky Behavior)：

垂直固定 (Sticky Top)： 當頁面向下捲動時，**整個第一列標題（包含左、中、右所有標題）**都要固定在視窗頂部。

水平固定 (Sticky Side)： 當水平向右捲動時，左側資訊欄必須固定在左邊；右側合計欄必須固定在右邊。

關鍵細節： 中間區塊的「日期標題」在垂直捲動時要留在頂部，但在水平捲動時必須隨內容左右移動，不能遮擋到其他日期。

視覺效果：

固定欄位的交界處請加上淡淡的陰影 (Box-shadow)，以區分滾動內容。

表格容器需設定 overflow: auto。

請確保 z-index 設定正確，避免滾動時內容互相穿透（標題層級應最高）。

請提供一個乾淨的 HTML 結構與對應的 CSS 範例。

3. 你可以如何檢視 AI 給你的程式碼？
當 AI 產出結果時，請檢查它是否有用到以下關鍵語法，這代表它是正確理解你需求的：

position: sticky;：這是核心，如果它用 position: absolute，請叫它重寫。

top: 0;：這是讓日期標題垂直固定的關鍵。

z-index: 10; (標題列) 與 z-index: 5; (固定側欄)：標題的層級必須比側欄高，這樣在捲動到左上角時，標題才不會被側欄蓋住。

background-color：固定欄位必須設定背景顏色（通常是白色或淺灰色），否則捲動過去時，後面的文字會透出來，看起來會亂成一團。

這套提示詞能確保 AI 幫你處理好那些最煩人的「轉角處」定位問題。如果你在實作時發現捲動不順暢，通常只要檢查父容器（Container）是否有設定 overflow: auto 即可解決！

## 問題診斷：為什麼版面不自動調整

**從截圖觀察到的行為差異：**

| 縮放比 | 能看到的日期欄數 | 期間估計用量 | 有無橫向捲軸（表格內部） |
|--------|---------|------------|---------------------|
| 100% | 3/1 ～ 4/20（約 8 欄） | 看不到 | 看不到 |
| 80%  | 3/1 ～ 5/6（約 13 欄） | 看不到 | 看不到 |
| 67%  | 全部欄位 | **看得到** | 不需要 |
| 50%  | 全部欄位 | **看得到** | 不需要 |

這個規律指向一個明確的根本原因。

---

### 根本原因：`<main>` 缺少 `min-width:0`

在 CSS Flexbox 中，flex 子元件的預設最小寬度是 `auto`（= 內容的自然寬度），而**不是** 0。

頁面結構是這樣的：

```
<div class="flex">           ← flex 容器
  <aside class="w-52 fixed"> ← 側欄（固定寬度）
  <main class="flex-1">      ← ⚠️ 缺少 min-width:0
    <div class="inv-wrap overflow-x:auto">
      <table>  ← 表格總寬約 1830px
```

因為 `main` 沒有 `min-width:0`，瀏覽器讓它「自然撐開」到表格的全寬（約 1830px），而不是限制在視窗寬度內。結果：

- `inv-wrap` 跟著 `main` 一起變寬到 1830px
- 表格 `width:100%` = 1830px，剛好等於容器，**沒有溢出**
- 沒有溢出 → `overflow-x:auto` 不產生捲軸 → **捲軸開在「整個頁面層級」而不是「表格內部」**
- `position:sticky; right:0` 的觸發條件是「表格比 inv-wrap 寬」，但此時兩者相等，**sticky right 永遠不啟動**
- 所以 `期間估計用量` 跑到頁面最右邊，**必須捲動整個頁面才看得到**

縮小到 67% 之所以「好像正常了」，是因為縮放後視窗可容納的 CSS 像素數增加，1830px 剛好塞進去，所有欄位自然顯示，sticky right 反而「不需要啟動」也看得到。

---

### 修正方案

`<main>` 加上 `min-width:0`，讓它真正被限制在視窗內：

```html
<!-- 改前 -->
<main class="flex-1 md:ml-52 px-4 md:px-6 py-5 pb-28 md:pb-10">

<!-- 改後 -->
<main class="flex-1 min-w-0 md:ml-52 px-4 md:px-6 py-5 pb-28 md:pb-10">
```

加這一個 class 後：
- `main` 被限制在視窗寬度內
- `inv-wrap` 也跟著被限制
- 表格溢出 `inv-wrap` → 橫向捲軸出現在**表格內部**
- `sticky right` 正確啟動 → `期間估計用量` 永遠貼在右邊
- 更新紀錄的容器也同樣受益，恢復響應式

---

## 關於 Two-way Sticky Header：辦得到，且我們已接近了

你描述的三區固定概念，和我們現在的實作方向完全一致。現況對比：

| 功能 | 目前狀態 | 說明 |
|------|---------|------|
| **左欄水平固定**（品項～待收貨）| ✅ 已實作 | `.sl-0` ～ `.sl-4`，需 `min-width:0` 才真正生效 |
| **右欄水平固定**（期間估計用量）| ✅ 已實作 | `.sr`，同上，需 `min-width:0` 才生效 |
| **日期欄標題垂直固定**（捲動頁面時）| ⚠️ 部分 | 目前 `top:0` 是相對 `inv-wrap` 內部捲軸，不是頁面捲動 |
| 右上角陰影區分固定與滾動區 | ✅ 已有 | `box-shadow` 已設定 |

唯一尚未達成的是：**「使用者往下捲動頁面時，表格的日期標題列是否跟著固定在畫面頂部？」**

這需要討論：目前 `inv-wrap` 有 `max-height:500px` + 內部捲軸，適合「頁面不動、在表格框框內垂直捲動」的場景。如果你希望隨著**整頁捲動**標題列仍然固定，需要把方向換成「讓整頁捲動，取消 max-height」，改法不難但影響整體 UX 感受。

---

等你的新圖示上來，我們一起確認設計方向後，再執行修正。修正本身很小（改一個 class），但要先確認垂直捲動的需求。

**ZY**（2026-05-06 23:56）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session continues iterative UI refinement of `kucun.html` (庫存總覽) in the 培養液管理系統. The session covers v1.3.3 → v1.3.7 improvements.

**Round 1 (v1.3.4)**: User requested:
- Only show 7-8 date columns at once, rest behind scrollbar
- Move scrollbar to TOP of table (currently hard to find at bottom)
- Fix sticky header: disappears when scrolling down
- Status badges: remove "充足" and "無資料", only keep 注意/危急

**Round 2 (v1.3.5 attempt)**: User clarified:
- The problem is that ALL columns are being displayed at once, making the scrollbar useless
- "需要限縮它的寬度距離，捲軸才會出現" (need to constrain the width so the scrollbar appears)
- NOT about fixing individual column widths

**Round 3 (Critical clarification)**: User said:
- NOT a monitor resolution issue — they ZOOMED OUT Chrome to see everything
- 期間估計用量 should ALWAYS appear at the RIGHT EDGE of the viewport (sticky right) — but it doesn't
- Original design consensus: LEFT fixed columns + RIGHT fixed column + MIDDLE scrollable
- Asked whether this consensus has been achieved

**Approved final fix (v1.3.7)**:
- Give `.inv-wrap` `max-width:1300px` to force consistent horizontal overflow
- Give `.inv-wrap` `max-height:500px` (fixed, not viewport-relative) to force consistent vertical overflow
- Both changes ensure sticky behavior always triggers regardless of screen size or zoom

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- `position:sticky` behavior requires nearest scroll container ancestor (set by `overflow:auto/scroll/hidden`)
- `overflow:hidden` on ancestor (the white card) clips sticky elements that move outside ancestor bounds → caused header to become completely invisible in v1.3.5
- `overflow-y:clip` does not create a scroll container (unlike `overflow-y:auto/hidden`) — used to allow page-relative sticky, but was abandoned
- CSS sticky requires the element's container to actually OVERFLOW for sticky to trigger
- `width:100%` on table auto-fills the container width → table never overflows → no scrollbar → no sticky
- `width:max-content; min-width:100%` lets table take its natural width (wider than container when many event columns)
- Mirror scrollbar: a synchronized div above the table with `overflow-x:auto` showing the scrollbar at top
- Without `max-width` on `.inv-wrap`, the container inflates to full viewport, table always fits, ALL sticky behavior fails
- Corner sticky cells (intersection of row-sticky + col-sticky) need higher z-index (6) than regular headers (4)
- `table-layout:auto` (default): browser ignores `max-width` on `<th>` elements; explicit inline `width:80px` forces column widths

3. Files and Code Sections:

**`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (main file, v1.3.3 → v1.3.7 in progress)

Current CSS state (after latest edit, partial v1.3.7):
```css
/* Inventory table wrapper — KEY FIX */
.inv-wrap { overflow:auto; max-width:1300px; max-height:500px; border-radius:0 0 16px 16px; }

/* Table width — forces natural content width */
.inv-table { width:max-content; min-width:100%; border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; }

/* Sticky header row — relative to .inv-wrap container */
.inv-table th { position:sticky; top:0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; color:#64748B; letter-spacing:.05em; padding:10px 12px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:2px solid #E2E4F4; white-space:nowrap; z-index:4; }

/* Corner cells (both top-sticky AND left/right-sticky) need higher z-index */
.inv-table th.s0,.inv-table th.s1,.inv-table th.s2,.inv-table th.s3,.inv-table th.s4,.inv-table th.s-right { z-index:6; }

/* Top scrollbar mirror — STILL NEEDS max-width:1300px */
#inv-scroll-mirror { overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; height:14px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:1px solid #E2E4F4; }
#inv-scroll-mirror::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }
#inv-scroll-spacer { height:1px; }
```

Sticky column CSS (left side, 600px total):
```css
.inv-table th.s0,.inv-table td.s0 { position:sticky; left:0;     z-index:3; width:130px; min-width:130px; }
.inv-table th.s1,.inv-table td.s1 { position:sticky; left:130px; z-index:3; width:120px; min-width:120px; }
.inv-table th.s2,.inv-table td.s2 { position:sticky; left:250px; z-index:3; width:80px;  min-width:80px;  }
.inv-table th.s3,.inv-table td.s3 { position:sticky; left:330px; z-index:3; width:180px; min-width:180px; }
.inv-table th.s4,.inv-table td.s4 { position:sticky; left:510px; z-index:3; width:90px;  min-width:90px;  border-right:1.5px solid #E2E4F4; }
.inv-table th.s-right,.inv-table td.s-right { position:sticky; right:0; z-index:3; width:110px; min-width:110px; border-left:1.5px solid #E2E4F4; }
```

Status badge (simplified):
```javascript
function badgeHtml(status) {
  if (status === 'warn') return `<span class="badge b-warn">🟠 注意</span>`;
  if (status === 'crit') return `<span class="badge b-crit">🔴 危急</span>`;
  return '';
}
```

Event column header (inline width forces fixed-width columns):
```javascript
theadHtml += `<th class="cl-col-th" style="width:80px;min-width:80px;max-width:80px">
  <div class="font-bold text-slate-600">${M}/${D}</div>
  <span class="src-badge ${srcCls}" style="margin-top:2px;font-size:10px">${srcLbl}</span>
</th>`;
```

HTML structure (inside white card):
```html
<div class="md:hidden px-4 py-2 bg-amber-50 ...">左右滑動提示</div>
<div id="inv-scroll-mirror" class="hidden md:block"><div id="inv-scroll-spacer"></div></div>
<div class="inv-wrap" id="inv-wrap-inner">
  <table class="inv-table" id="inv-table">
    <thead><tr id="inv-thead-row"></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="inv-tbody"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

Mirror scrollbar sync JS:
```javascript
function initScrollSync() {
  const mirror = document.getElementById('inv-scroll-mirror');
  const wrap   = document.getElementById('inv-wrap-inner');
  const table  = document.getElementById('inv-table');
  if (!mirror || !wrap || !table) return;
  document.getElementById('inv-scroll-spacer').style.width = table.scrollWidth + 'px';
  mirror.onscroll = null; wrap.onscroll = null;
  mirror.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!mirror._lock) { wrap._lock=true; wrap.scrollLeft=mirror.scrollLeft; wrap._lock=false; } });
  wrap.addEventListener('scroll',   () => { if (!wrap._lock)   { mirror._lock=true; mirror.scrollLeft=wrap.scrollLeft; mirror._lock=false; } });
}
```

render() calls initScrollSync():
```javascript
function render() {
  ...
  if (hasAny) renderInventoryTable(cachedData);
  renderChangelog(cachedData);
  if (hasAny) initScrollSync();
}
```

**`C:\Users\User\.claude\plans\prd-beipan-html-gupan-html-order-html-j-vectorized-pancake.md`**
- Updated with Phase 3.5-R4 section documenting the v1.3.7 fix

4. Errors and Fixes:

**v1.3.5 Critical Bug — Header completely invisible**:
- Used `overflow-y:clip` + `position:sticky; top:56px`
- The card's `overflow:hidden` clips sticky elements that move outside the card's visual bounds when sticky activates relative to page
- Fix: Reverted to `overflow:auto` on `.inv-wrap` and `top:0` on `<th>` (sticky relative to container, not page)
- User: "全部都大錯特錯...表頭現在沒有正確顯示，而且無論我如何縮放螢幕，它都不會出現"

**Fundamental Design Misunderstanding — Root Cause of All Scroll Issues**:
- I repeatedly tried sticky/overflow-y approaches before identifying the core issue
- Root cause: no `max-width` on `.inv-wrap` → container inflates to full viewport → table always fits → no overflow → no scrollbar → no sticky
- Fix: `max-width:1300px` on `.inv-wrap`

**`max-height:calc(100vh - 240px)` too large on high-resolution screens**:
- On 1440p+ monitors, this could be 1200px+ which is larger than the product list height
- Fix: Changed to fixed `max-height:500px`

**HTML edit rejected mid-session**:
- User stopped an edit to the mirror scrollbar HTML to ask clarification about Issue 2C (the "3 瓶" display meaning)
- Had to re-apply the edit after clarification

**`old_string not found` error on lotsHtml edit**:
- After a rejected edit, file content didn't match expected string
- Fix: Re-read the file at the specific line range and used exact current content

5. Problem Solving:

**Horizontal scroll consistently present**: The core insight was that `max-width:1300px` on `.inv-wrap` means:
- Left sticky (600px) + visible event area (~590px = ~7 columns at 80px) + right sticky (110px) = 1300px total
- The table with 8+ event columns is always wider than 1300px → always overflows → scrollbar always appears
- This is viewport/zoom independent

**Right sticky column always visible**: With horizontal overflow guaranteed, `position:sticky; right:0` on 期間估計用量 works correctly — it always appears at the right edge of `.inv-wrap`

**Vertical sticky header**: With `max-height:500px` and 25+ products at ~40px/row = ~1000px of content > 500px → always overflow → `position:sticky; top:0` always sticks header at top of `.inv-wrap`

**Scrollbar position at top**: Mirror div (`#inv-scroll-mirror`, 14px high) placed above `.inv-wrap`, synced bidirectionally with JS. Both mirror and `.inv-wrap` need matching `max-width:1300px`.

**ZY**（2026-05-07 00:06）：

前三張圖是我試錯的結果。的確可能就像你說的，寬度是固定的，但它還是沒有符合我剛才的需求。

從下面更新紀錄的白框中，我得知這個白框也會隨著螢幕放大縮小而調整，但調整的幅度是有限的，這句話對不對？

第二個問題是，雖然我們限縮了寬度，但可以很明顯看到，右側「期間估計用量」的欄位並沒有貼著右邊，而是也被固定住了；它理應要貼著右邊才對。

接著，雖然我可以轉動捲軸，但感覺並沒有真正區分出左側、中間、右邊這三個明確的區塊。感覺部分內容有區別，但上面的標題卻沒有區別，導致捲軸的寬幅竟然從最左邊一直延伸到「期間估計用量」之前，有這麼長的 bar，但它其實應該只出現在中間才對。

所以我認為你並沒有明確地幫我切成三個部分：
1. 圖層關係
   如果存在上下層的關係，左側跟右側應該屬於上層圖層，中間則是下層圖層，這樣中間的部分在滾動時才會被遮住或擋住。
2. 切分方式
   我推測你並沒有真的把它切分成想像中的三個部分，或者標題與內容的切分方式有所差異，導致現在標題與內容的切分不一致。
3. 右側對齊
   右邊欄位其實不是貼著右邊，只是「看起來」在右邊，而不是「從右邊數過來」貼齊右側。

以上這些因素導致中間現在呈現很混亂的現象。你可以再告訴我，我說的對不對？我們可以再討論一下。

**YOHOHO**（2026-05-07 06:08）：

已讀完 CSS 結構。你說的三點**全部正確**，我來逐一確認，然後說明根本原因。

---

## 確認你的三個觀察

**第一點（白框跟著視窗調整）**：對。更新紀錄的白框是 `width:100%` 的容器，會隨視窗寬窄而伸縮。

---

**第二點（捲軸範圍太寬）**：對，而且更精確的說法是——因為現在是一張完整的 `<table>`，瀏覽器計算「可捲動範圍」時，把整張表從第一欄算到最後一欄。左側固定欄雖然視覺上不動，但它的寬度（600px）仍然計入捲軸的 track 長度。所以捲軸顯得特別長，這不是「看起來長」，是真的在追蹤錯誤的範圍。

---

**第三點（期間估計用量沒有真正貼右邊）**：對，而且找到真正的根本原因了。

目前的測試資料只有 4 個日期事件（5/1、5/3、5/6、5/8），4 欄 × 80px = 320px。加上左側 600px + 右側 110px，整張表只有 **1030px 寬**。但 `.inv-wrap` 的 `max-width` 設了 1300px，所以容器比表格更寬。

**表格沒有溢出容器 → 沒有捲軸 → `position:sticky; right:0` 根本不會觸發。**

那它為什麼「看起來在右邊」？因為它就是表格最後一欄，自然待在 1030px 的位置。但它不是「從右邊數 110px 固定住的」，只是剛好長在那裡。

---

## 根本問題

你說得非常準確：**我沒有真的切成三塊**。目前是用一張 `<table>` + CSS `position:sticky` 模擬出「看起來像三塊」的假象，但本質上它是一整體。這導致：

- 捲軸永遠追蹤全表寬度，無法只追蹤中間
- sticky 能不能觸發，取決於資料量（事件欄夠不夠多）
- 沒有圖層概念，左右欄無法真正「蓋在」中間上方

---

## 正確的做法：三個獨立容器

真正的修法是把 HTML 結構改成三個獨立的 `<div>`：

```
[左 div: 600px 固定][中 div: flex:1 獨立橫向捲動][右 div: 110px 固定]
```

- 左右各自是 `overflow:hidden`，不捲動
- 中間是 `overflow:auto`，有自己的捲軸（只覆蓋中間範圍）
- 縱向捲動：中間捲動時，JS 同步帶動左右 div 的 `scrollTop`
- 因為是三張獨立的 `<table>`，每行高度需要 JS 同步對齊

這是比較大的重構，但是徹底解決你說的三個問題。我把這個計畫整理進檔案，你確認後再開始執行。

**ZY**（2026-05-07 06:31）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

The session began by completing two pending edits for v1.3.7 (add `max-width:1300px` to `#inv-scroll-mirror` CSS, update version from v1.3.6 to v1.3.7). Then the user provided 6 browser screenshots and made a detailed analysis of 3 fundamental problems with the current approach — asking for confirmation and a plan to truly fix them. After plan approval, the main request became: **rewrite `kucun.html` from single-table+sticky approach to a true three-panel layout (v1.4.0)** so that:
- The horizontal scrollbar only covers the middle event-columns area
- The right column (期間估計用量) is ALWAYS at the right edge of the viewport (not conditionally sticky)
- Left and right panels truly overlay/isolate from the middle panel

The user's three specific observations that triggered this rewrite:
1. **圖層關係**: Left/right should be above (higher z-index layer) the middle scrollable content
2. **切分方式**: Header and content splitting is inconsistent between panels
3. **右側對齊**: 期間估計用量 only looks like it's on the right, but isn't truly right-aligned — because `position:sticky; right:0` only triggers when the table overflows the container, which doesn't happen with few event columns (4 columns × 80px = 320px + 600px + 110px = 1030px < 1300px max-width → no overflow → sticky never activates)

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- `position:sticky` CSS: requires nearest scrollable ancestor with `overflow:auto/scroll`; only triggers when the element would naturally scroll past the sticky boundary — if no overflow exists, sticky has no effect
- Root cause of all v1.3.x failures: single `<table>` in `overflow:auto` container means the scrollbar covers the full table width including "sticky" left columns, and `sticky right:0` is data-dependent
- True three-panel layout: three separate `<div>` containers + three `<table>` elements with JS-synchronized vertical scroll and row heights
- `overflow-y:scroll` with `scrollbar-width:none` / `::-webkit-scrollbar { display:none }` — allows programmatic `scrollTop` setting on left/right panels without showing scrollbars
- Row height synchronization: after render, measure `offsetHeight` for each row across three tables, apply max height to all three
- Mirror scrollbar: positioned above the mid panel only (with 600px left spacer + scrollable mid section + 110px right spacer)
- `requestAnimationFrame` for measuring heights after DOM update
- `flex:1; min-width:0` on mid panel to allow proper flex shrinking

3. Files and Code Sections:

**`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (v1.3.7 → v1.4.0, main file)

Edit 1 — CSS replaced (old `.inv-wrap`, `.inv-table` sticky, `#inv-scroll-mirror`):
```css
/* ── Three-panel inventory layout ── */
.three-panel-body { display:flex; max-height:500px; }
.left-panel  { flex:none; width:600px; overflow-x:hidden; overflow-y:scroll; scrollbar-width:none; -ms-overflow-style:none; border-right:2px solid #E2E4F4; box-shadow:4px 0 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.08); position:relative; z-index:2; }
.left-panel::-webkit-scrollbar  { display:none; }
.mid-panel   { flex:1; overflow:auto; min-width:0; }
.right-panel { flex:none; width:110px; overflow-x:hidden; overflow-y:scroll; scrollbar-width:none; -ms-overflow-style:none; border-left:2px solid #E2E4F4; box-shadow:-4px 0 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.08); position:relative; z-index:2; }
.right-panel::-webkit-scrollbar { display:none; }
#inv-scroll-mirror { flex:1; overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; height:14px; background:#F8F7FD; }
#inv-scroll-mirror::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }
#inv-scroll-spacer { height:1px; }
.panel-table { border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; }
#left-table  { width:100%; }
#mid-table   { width:max-content; min-width:100%; }
#right-table { width:100%; }
.panel-table th { position:sticky; top:0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; color:#64748B; letter-spacing:.05em; padding:10px 12px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:2px solid #E2E4F4; white-space:nowrap; z-index:2; }
.panel-table td { padding:10px 12px; border-bottom:1px solid #F1F5F9; vertical-align:top; font-size:13.5px; background:white; }
.panel-table tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom:none; }
.panel-table tbody tr:hover td { background:#FAFAFA; }
.group-row td { background:#F1F5F9 !important; padding:6px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#475569; letter-spacing:.07em; text-transform:uppercase; }
#mid-table th.year-sep, #mid-table td.year-sep { min-width:20px; width:20px; max-width:20px; padding:0; background:#EDE9FF !important; border-left:1px dashed #C4BFEA; border-right:1px dashed #C4BFEA; }
.year-sep-inner { writing-mode:vertical-rl; transform:rotate(180deg); font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#7A75BB; letter-spacing:.08em; padding:6px 0; display:block; text-align:center; }
```

Edit 2 — Version: `v1.3.7` → `v1.4.0`

Edit 3 — HTML structure (replaced single-table div):
```html
<!-- Top scrollbar mirror: left spacer + mid mirror + right spacer -->
<div class="hidden md:flex items-stretch" style="background:#F8F7FD;border-bottom:1px solid #E2E4F4">
  <div style="flex:none;width:600px"></div>
  <div id="inv-scroll-mirror"><div id="inv-scroll-spacer"></div></div>
  <div style="flex:none;width:110px"></div>
</div>
<!-- Three-panel body -->
<div class="three-panel-body" id="three-panel-body">
  <div class="left-panel" id="left-panel">
    <table class="panel-table" id="left-table">
      <thead><tr id="left-thead"></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="left-tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
  <div class="mid-panel" id="mid-panel">
    <table class="panel-table" id="mid-table">
      <thead><tr id="mid-thead"></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="mid-tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
  <div class="right-panel" id="right-panel">
    <table class="panel-table" id="right-table">
      <thead><tr id="right-thead"></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="right-tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
```

Edit 4 — `renderInventoryTable()` rewrite (split into three table builders):
```javascript
function renderInventoryTable(data) {
  productInfoCache = {};
  const products = getSortedProducts(data);
  const cols = buildChangelogCols(data.changelog);
  const lotToggleLabel = showAllLots ? '全部批' : '近兩批';

  // Left thead
  document.getElementById('left-thead').innerHTML = `
    <th style="width:130px">品項</th>
    <th style="width:120px">庫存 / 安全量</th>
    <th style="width:80px">狀態</th>
    <th style="width:180px"><span>批號 / 效期</span><button class="lot-toggle-th-btn" onclick="toggleLots()" id="lot-toggle-btn">${lotToggleLabel}</button></th>
    <th style="width:90px">待收貨</th>
  `;

  // Mid thead (event cols)
  let midTheadHtml = '';
  // ... builds event column headers
  if (!midTheadHtml) midTheadHtml = '<th style="min-width:40px"></th>';
  document.getElementById('mid-thead').innerHTML = midTheadHtml;

  // Right thead
  document.getElementById('right-thead').innerHTML = `<th ...>期間估計用量 ℹ️</th>`;

  const leftRows = [], midRows = [], rightRows = [];
  let lastGroupKey = null;

  products.forEach(p => {
    // Group header rows — in all THREE tables
    leftRows.push(`<tr class="group-row"><td colspan="5">${groupKey}</td></tr>`);
    midRows.push(`<tr class="group-row"><td colspan="999"></td></tr>`);
    rightRows.push(`<tr class="group-row"><td></td></tr>`);
    
    // Product rows in each table
    leftRows.push(`<tr><td>...</td><td>stockCell</td><td>badge</td><td>lotsHtml</td><td>pending</td></tr>`);
    midRows.push(`<tr>${midCells}</tr>`);
    rightRows.push(`<tr><td style="text-align:center;padding:10px 8px">${estCell}</td></tr>`);
  });

  document.getElementById('left-tbody').innerHTML  = leftRows.join('');
  document.getElementById('mid-tbody').innerHTML   = midRows.join('');
  document.getElementById('right-tbody').innerHTML = rightRows.join('');

  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    syncRowHeights();
    initScrollSync();
  });
}
```

Edit 5 — `render()`: Removed standalone `if (hasAny) initScrollSync();` line

Edit 6 — Added `syncRowHeights()` + updated `initScrollSync()`:
```javascript
function syncRowHeights() {
  const leftRows  = [...document.querySelectorAll('#left-table tr')];
  const midRows   = [...document.querySelectorAll('#mid-table tr')];
  const rightRows = [...document.querySelectorAll('#right-table tr')];
  const n = Math.max(leftRows.length, midRows.length, rightRows.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    if (leftRows[i])  leftRows[i].style.height = '';
    if (midRows[i])   midRows[i].style.height  = '';
    if (rightRows[i]) rightRows[i].style.height = '';
    const h = Math.max(
      leftRows[i]?.offsetHeight  || 0,
      midRows[i]?.offsetHeight   || 0,
      rightRows[i]?.offsetHeight || 0
    );
    if (h > 0) {
      if (leftRows[i])  leftRows[i].style.height  = h + 'px';
      if (midRows[i])   midRows[i].style.height    = h + 'px';
      if (rightRows[i]) rightRows[i].style.height  = h + 'px';
    }
  }
}

function initScrollSync() {
  const mirror     = document.getElementById('inv-scroll-mirror');
  const midPanel   = document.getElementById('mid-panel');
  const leftPanel  = document.getElementById('left-panel');
  const rightPanel = document.getElementById('right-panel');
  const midTable   = document.getElementById('mid-table');
  if (!mirror || !midPanel || !midTable) return;
  const spacer = document.getElementById('inv-scroll-spacer');
  if (spacer) spacer.style.width = midTable.scrollWidth + 'px';
  mirror._lock = false; midPanel._lock = false;
  mirror.onscroll = null; midPanel.onscroll = null;
  mirror.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    if (!mirror._lock) { midPanel._lock = true; midPanel.scrollLeft = mirror.scrollLeft; midPanel._lock = false; }
  });
  midPanel.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    if (!midPanel._lock) { mirror._lock = true; mirror.scrollLeft = midPanel.scrollLeft; mirror._lock = false; }
    if (leftPanel)  leftPanel.scrollTop  = midPanel.scrollTop;
    if (rightPanel) rightPanel.scrollTop = midPanel.scrollTop;
  });
}
```

**`C:\Users\User\.claude\plans\prd-beipan-html-gupan-html-order-html-j-vectorized-pancake.md`**
- Updated: Phase 3.5-R4 marked ✅ completed
- Added: Phase 3.5-R5 section documenting the three-panel rewrite as the correct architectural fix, including root cause analysis, HTML structure plan, JS changes table, and verification steps

4. Errors and fixes:
- **v1.3.7 fundamental flaw**: `max-width:1300px` on container + `position:sticky` approach fails when test data has fewer than ~8 event columns (table width < 1300px → no overflow → no sticky trigger). Fix: abandoned CSS sticky approach entirely, moved to true three-panel DOM structure.
- **All previous v1.3.x CSS sticky attempts**: The single-table approach was architecturally incapable of meeting the requirements because (a) scrollbar always tracks full table width, (b) sticky right is data-dependent, (c) no true layer isolation. Fix: v1.4.0 three-panel complete rewrite.

5. Problem Solving:
**Solved**: Identified the precise root cause of all sticky failures — the scrollbar range always includes "sticky" column widths, and `sticky right:0` requires actual content overflow to trigger (which is data-dependent).

**Solved**: Designed and implemented true three-panel layout where:
- Each panel is an independent scroll container
- Left/right panels use hidden scrollbars but remain programmatically scrollable for vertical sync
- Middle panel has the ONLY visible scrollbar, covering only event columns
- Right panel is always at the right edge regardless of data volume
- Row heights are synchronized via JS after each render

## 你想要的是什麼（我的理解）

1. **左側固定**：品項、庫存、狀態、批號、待收貨 — 永遠可見，不會被遮住
2. **右側固定**：期間估計用量 — 永遠貼在視窗最右邊
3. **中間彈性**：能塞幾天就顯示幾天；太多天就出現**橫向捲軸**讓你滑動查看
4. **整體響應**：外層白框寬度隨螢幕調整，不是固定死 1300px 或某個像素數

這個理解是否正確？

---

## v1.4.0 做了什麼錯誤的事

三個獨立面板的做法引入了新問題：
- 三個容器各自有垂直捲軸 → 三條捲軸出現
- JS 同步行高在 HTML 還沒繪製完成時容易算錯 → 列不對齊
- 整體複雜度大幅上升，反而不穩定

---

## 正確的解法（比三面板更簡單）

其實不需要三個獨立表格。回到**單一表格 + CSS sticky**，但這次做對：

```
容器: overflow-x:auto（只有這一個橫向捲軸）
表格: min-width:100%（讓它撐滿容器，右欄自然靠右）

左欄 1（品項）:   position:sticky; left:0px
左欄 2（庫存）:   position:sticky; left:130px
左欄 3（狀態）:   position:sticky; left:250px
左欄 4（批號）:   position:sticky; left:330px
左欄 5（待收貨）: position:sticky; left:510px

右欄（期間用量）: position:sticky; right:0
```

關鍵在 `min-width:100%`：
- **事件欄少**（表格填不滿）→ 表格 = 100% 容器寬 → 右欄自然貼右邊
- **事件欄多**（表格超出容器）→ 表格溢出 → 橫向捲軸出現 → sticky right 觸發 → 右欄貼右邊

這樣：一個捲軸、行高天然對齊、不需要 JS 同步、響應式自動處理。

---

## 我的建議

還原成單一表格，移除三面板結構，用上面的 CSS sticky 正確實作（v1.5.0）。

你同意這個方向嗎？確認後我立刻執行。

**ZY**（2026-05-10 10:21）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

The user (ZY, an IVF embryologist at 送子鳥生殖中心) is building a lab culture medium management system (培養液管理系統). The current session's primary focus is on **kucun.html v1.5.1** — fixing the responsive layout bug where the inventory table's columns don't behave correctly at different browser zoom levels.

Specifically, the user reported:
- At 100%/80% zoom: The "期間估計用量" (period estimated usage) right column was NOT visible at the right edge — you had to scroll the entire PAGE to find it
- The changelog (更新紀錄) section also lost its responsive width behavior
- At 67%/50% zoom: The layout appeared to work correctly, which was confusing

The user shared 4 screenshots (100%, 80%, 67%, 50% zoom) and an annotated diagram showing the desired 3-zone layout:
- **Left green zone**: Fixed columns (品項, 庫存/安全量, 狀態, 批號/效期, 待收貨)
- **Middle orange zone**: Scrollable date event columns ("可以視網頁寬度>彈性出現多少欄數，然後他是一個時間軸，所以剩餘資訊可以用滾輪左右查看")
- **Right green zone**: Fixed column (期間估計用量)
- **Top red bar**: Fixed header row ("固定")

The user also asked about "Two-way Sticky Header/Column" (雙向固定標題), whether it was achievable. After my analysis, they confirmed no additional diagram was coming and asked me to directly make the fix.

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **CSS `position:sticky`**: The core mechanism for fixed left/right/top columns in a single HTML table
- **Flexbox `min-width:auto` vs `min-width:0` (min-w-0)**: The root cause of the bug — flex children without `min-width:0` expand to their content's natural width, preventing overflow from triggering within child scroll containers
- **`overflow-x:auto` triggering**: Requires the table to actually overflow its container; without `min-width:0` on `main`, the container expands to match the table so no overflow occurs
- **Browser zoom and CSS pixel viewport**: At reduced zoom (e.g., 67%), more CSS pixels become visible in the viewport, so a table that was previously "too wide" now fits naturally — explaining why sticky appeared to work at lower zoom levels
- **Sticky right activation**: `position:sticky; right:0` only pins an element when it would naturally scroll off the right edge of its scroll container; if no overflow exists, it does nothing
- **`z-index` hierarchy** for sticky cells: normal td = auto, `th` (top sticky) = z-index:3, `tbody td` with sticky = z-index:2, `thead th` with sticky = z-index:4
- **Single-table approach (v1.5.0)**: Abandoned the previous three-panel approach in favor of a single `<table>` with CSS sticky on individual columns — correct approach that was just blocked by the `min-width` bug
- **Two-way sticky**: `position:sticky; top:0` for vertical (header sticks when scrolling vertically within inv-wrap), combined with `left:Xpx`/`right:0` for horizontal (columns stick when scrolling horizontally)
- **`border-collapse:separate`**: Required for `position:sticky` to work on table cells in all browsers

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (v1.5.0 → v1.5.1)
  - The main inventory overview page being fixed
  - The critical fix was at line 227

  **The one-line fix:**
  ```html
  <!-- Before (line 227) -->
  <main class="flex-1 md:ml-52 px-4 md:px-6 py-5 pb-28 md:pb-10">

  <!-- After -->
  <main class="flex-1 min-w-0 md:ml-52 px-4 md:px-6 py-5 pb-28 md:pb-10">
  ```

  **CSS sticky setup (lines 44-73):**
  ```css
  .inv-mirror { overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; height:14px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:1px solid #E2E4F4; }
  .inv-wrap { overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:auto; max-height:500px; }
  #inv-table { border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; width:100%; }
  #inv-table th { position:sticky; top:0; background:#F8F7FD; z-index:3; ... }
  #inv-table td { padding:10px 12px; border-bottom:1px solid #F1F5F9; vertical-align:top; font-size:13.5px; background:white; }
  .sl { position:sticky; z-index:2; background:white; }
  th.sl { background:#F8F7FD; z-index:4; }
  #inv-table tbody tr:hover .sl { background:#FAFAFA; }
  .sl-0 { left:0; }
  .sl-1 { left:130px; }
  .sl-2 { left:250px; }
  .sl-3 { left:330px; }
  .sl-4 { left:510px; box-shadow:4px 0 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.08); }
  .sr { position:sticky; right:0; z-index:2; background:white; box-shadow:-4px 0 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.08); }
  th.sr { background:#F8F7FD; z-index:4; }
  #inv-table tbody tr:hover .sr { background:#FAFAFA; }
  .ev-col { min-width:80px; width:80px; text-align:center; }
  ```

  **HTML table wrapper structure (lines 272-288):**
  ```html
  <div id="inv-wrap-outer" class="hidden">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden mb-6">
      <div class="md:hidden px-4 py-2 bg-amber-50 border-b border-amber-100 text-xs text-amber-700 flex items-center gap-1.5">
        左右滑動可查看使用紀錄
      </div>
      <div class="hidden md:block inv-mirror" id="inv-mirror"><div id="inv-spacer"></div></div>
      <div class="inv-wrap" id="inv-wrap">
        <table id="inv-table">
          <thead id="inv-thead"></thead>
          <tbody id="inv-tbody"></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  ```

  **JS tbody row generation with sticky classes (lines 871-879):**
  ```javascript
  tbodyRows.push(`<tr>
    <td class="sl sl-0"><div class="font-semibold text-slate-800 text-sm">${p.name}</div></td>
    <td class="sl sl-1">${stockCell}</td>
    <td class="sl sl-2">${badgeHtml(info.status)}</td>
    <td class="sl sl-3">${lotsHtml(info.lots, info.orangeDays, info.redDays)}</td>
    <td class="sl sl-4">${pendingCell}</td>
    ${midCells}
    <td class="sr" style="text-align:center;padding:10px 8px">${estCell}</td>
  </tr>`);
  ```

  **Version updated at line 233:**
  ```html
  <span class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono">v1.5.1</span>
  ```

4. Errors and fixes:

- **v1.5.0 layout bug — `期間估計用量` not visible at right edge at 100% zoom**:
  - **Root cause**: `<main class="flex-1 ...">` was missing `min-w-0` (Tailwind = `min-width:0`). In CSS Flexbox, flex children default to `min-width:auto`, causing `main` to expand to its content's full natural width (~1830px for the table). This made `inv-wrap` also expand to 1830px, matching the table width exactly, so there was zero overflow. With no overflow, `overflow-x:auto` produced no scrollbar inside the table, and `position:sticky; right:0` never activated. The PAGE scrolled horizontally instead of the table.
  - **Why it appeared to work at smaller zoom**: Browser zoom-out (e.g., 67%) increases the number of visible CSS pixels, making the effective viewport wide enough to fit 1830px naturally — so the column appeared at the right edge without needing sticky
  - **Fix**: Added `min-w-0` to `<main>` — constrains main within the flex container, forces `inv-wrap` to be viewport-width, table overflows inv-wrap, scrollbar appears within table, sticky right activates correctly
  - Version bumped to v1.5.1

- **Previous sessions context** (from summary):
  - v1.3.x: `position:sticky; right:0` only triggers when table overflows container. With `max-width:1300px` and few event columns, no overflow → sticky-right never activated
  - v1.4.0: Three-panel layout (left div + mid div + right div) caused three separate vertical scrollbars, and `syncRowHeights()` measured DOM before rendering was complete → rows misaligned
  - v1.5.0: Single table with CSS sticky — correct approach, just needed the `min-width:0` fix

5. Problem Solving:

**Solved**: The root cause of `期間估計用量` not appearing at the right edge at 100% zoom.

The investigation path:
1. Read CSS (lines 44-73) — sticky CSS looked correct syntactically
2. Read HTML structure (lines 272-325) — noted outer card has `overflow-hidden` (considered if this interfered with sticky)
3. Read JS renderInventoryTable (lines 790-884) — confirmed `.sr` class correctly applied to right column th and td
4. Read page layout structure (lines 140-250) — **found the bug**: `<main class="flex-1 ...">` missing `min-w-0`

The fix was identified as a one-word Tailwind class addition. Explanation of the zoom-level behavior difference also clarified for user.

**Analysis given to user** (table format):
| Zoom | Event columns visible | 期間估計用量 | Internal horizontal scrollbar |
|------|----------------------|------------|-------------------------------|
| 100% | 3/1 to 4/20 (~8) | Not visible | Not visible |
| 80%  | 3/1 to 5/6 (~13)  | Not visible | Not visible |
| 67%  | All columns        | **Visible** | Not needed |
| 50%  | All columns        | **Visible** | Not needed |

**Two-way Sticky analysis** provided:
| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Left columns horizontal sticky | ✅ Implemented | `.sl-0` to `.sl-4`, needs `min-w-0` to activate |
| Right column horizontal sticky | ✅ Implemented | `.sr`, needs `min-w-0` to activate |
| Date header vertical sticky (with PAGE scroll) | ⚠️ Partial | Currently sticks within inv-wrap's internal scroll (max-height:500px), not page-level scroll |
| Shadow separators | ✅ Implemented | box-shadow on .sl-4 and .sr |

6. All user messages:

- [4 screenshots at 100%, 80%, 67%, 50% zoom + annotated diagram]: "為什麼它沒有辦法隨著我的螢幕縮放而自動調整？甚至連「更新紀錄」的欄位原本可以縮放，現在也不可以了。請先解決這第一個問題。你可以從圖中說明他們的差異，以及為什麼會發生這樣的現象嗎？" — Then described "Two-way Sticky" concept from another source, asked if it was achievable and if it would increase difficulty. Also asked for prompt recommendations.

- "我沒有其他的新圖示了，剛剛最後一張就是我想要說的。所以可以直接幫我做修正嗎？" — No new diagrams; the last annotated screenshot is what they meant. Directly asking for the fix to be applied.

7. Pending Tasks:

- User needs to verify v1.5.1 in browser by:
  1. Loading test data (click "載入測試資料" button)
  2. Confirming at 100% zoom that "期間估計用量" appears pinned at the right edge
  3. Testing horizontal scroll (left 5 columns stay fixed, middle scrolls, right column stays fixed)
  4. Testing at 80% zoom to confirm same behavior
- The vertical sticky behavior (header sticking when scrolling the PAGE down, not just within table's internal scroll) was identified but NOT implemented — it requires further discussion about whether to remove `max-height:500px` from `inv-wrap`

8. Current Work:

Just completed implementing v1.5.1 of `e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`. Two edits were made:

1. **Line 227** — Added `min-w-0` to `<main>`:

## 問題診斷

### Bug 1：Group-row 結構錯誤（主要根因）

在 JS 第 821 行，「培養液」/「試劑」分隔列的寫法是：

```javascript
// 現在的寫法：ONE 個 td colspan 所有欄
<tr class="group-row"><td colspan="totalCols" class="sl sl-0">培養液</td></tr>
```

而一般資料列是：

```javascript
// 資料列：5 個獨立的 sticky td
<td class="sl sl-0">品項</td>
<td class="sl sl-1">庫存</td>
<td class="sl sl-2">狀態</td>
<td class="sl sl-3">批號</td>
<td class="sl sl-4">待收貨</td>
```

**問題在哪：** group-row 只有一個超寬的 td（跨 5 左 + N 中 + 1 右所有欄），且這個 td 的 `position:sticky; left:0`。這意味著這一整個寬 td 的左邊緣固定在左側，但它的寬度延伸到整個表格右端，涵蓋了本應是 .sl-4 影子分隔線的位置，導致：

- 分隔列不會呈現 .sl-4 的右側陰影（視覺分界線消失）
- 分隔列的灰色背景 (`#F1F5F9`) 從 left:0 一路延伸到表格右端，覆蓋整個可視區域，視覺上像是「蓋住了左欄」

---

### Bug 2：Z-index 順序問題

現在的設定：

| 元素 | z-index | 說明 |
|------|---------|------|
| `th.sl`（角落欄頭）| 4 | 最高，正確 |
| `#inv-table th`（日期欄頭）| 3 | 中間 |
| `.sl` tbody 資料欄 | 2 | 最低 |

問題：日期欄頭（z-index:3）比左固定資料欄（z-index:2）高。雖然它們在不同列不會直接重疊，但瀏覽器的 paint order 會在特定縮放/捲動組合下產生渲染 artifact（日期欄頭「透出」左固定欄上方）。

---

### 評估「別人的建議」

| 建議 | 評估 |
|------|------|
| 所有 sticky th/td 加不透明 background-color | ✅ 正確，加 `background-color:white`（明確宣告）更安全 |
| z-index 階層：角落(30) > 中間頂部(20) > 左右資料欄(10) | ⚠️ 階層相對順序和現在相同（頂部 > 資料欄），但針對「日期欄頭透出左固定欄」的問題，**應該讓資料欄高於日期欄頭**，即左右資料欄 > 中間頂部 |
| 左固定欄加 `white-space: nowrap` | ✅ 正確，防止欄頭文字被壓縮 |

正確的 z-index 階層應為：

| 元素 | z-index | 邏輯 |
|------|---------|------|
| `th.sl`, `th.sr`（角落） | 30 | 最高，蓋住一切 |
| `.sl tbody`, `.sr tbody`（左右固定資料欄） | 20 | 高於日期欄頭，才不會被「透出」 |
| `#inv-table th`（日期欄頭） | 15 | 低於資料固定欄 |
| 一般 td | auto | 不設 |

---

## 修正計畫（等你確認再執行）

**Fix A — Group-row 結構重建（JS，第 821 行）**  
改為 5 個獨立的 sticky-left td（配合資料列結構），中間跨欄用一個 `<td colspan="N">` 表示中間+右欄：

```javascript
// 新寫法
`<tr class="group-row">
  <td class="sl sl-0" style="width:130px">${groupKey}</td>
  <td class="sl sl-1" style="width:120px"></td>
  <td class="sl sl-2" style="width:80px"></td>
  <td class="sl sl-3" style="width:180px"></td>
  <td class="sl sl-4" style="width:90px"></td>
  <td colspan="${cols.length + 1}"></td>
</tr>`
```

**Fix B — Z-index 修正（CSS，第 54-66 行）**  
更新為 30/20/15 階層，並加 `background-color` 明確宣告

**Fix C — 左固定欄頭加 `white-space:nowrap`（CSS，`.sl` 規則）**

---

版本：**v1.5.2**

**ZY**（2026-05-10 10:46）：

有發現改善了，但是還是沒有改對。

左邊這邊是沒有陰影的，右邊是有陰影的。我猜應該也是設定上出現一些差異，導致往左滑的時候，中間的標題還是一樣會覆蓋到左邊的標題。

可以再說明進一步的改善方式嗎？

我也有提供一些別的 AI 的想法，可以幫我同步一起做修正嗎？可以同步幫我一起做綜合性的討論跟評估嗎？

遇到的狀況如下：

表頭被覆蓋（X 不 OK）： 滾動的日期表頭（3/1、3/10）居然跑到固定表頭（待收貨）的「上面」。

無灰影： 左側固定區塊的右邊緣，原本寫了 box-shadow 卻顯示不出來，或是被吃掉了。

以下我為你拆解原因，並提供精確的 CSS 修改代碼。

🐞 錯誤原因拆解
1. 為什麼表頭會被覆蓋？（CSS 權重陷阱）
在你的 CSS 中，你寫了這兩行：

CSS
#inv-table th { position:sticky; top:0; background:#F8F7FD; z-index:3; }
th.sl { background:#F8F7FD; z-index:4; }
你的本意是讓 th.sl（固定在左側的表頭）擁有較高的 z-index: 4，藉此壓過滾動表頭的 z-index: 3。
但 CSS 的「權重計算」背叛了你：

#inv-table th 包含了一個 ID（100分）和一個標籤（1分），總權重是 101。

th.sl 包含一個類別（10分）和一個標籤（1分），總權重只有 11。

因為 101 > 11，所以 #inv-table th 的設定贏了！你的左側固定表頭 th.sl 最終拿到的還是 z-index: 3。
既然固定表頭和滾動表頭都是 z-index: 3，在 HTML 結構中越晚生成的元素會疊在越上面。因為滾動表頭（日期）是透過 JS 迴圈在後面生成的，所以它就無情地蓋在「待收貨」上面了。

這也解釋了為什麼身體區塊（Body, 藍色框 OK）沒問題：因為你的 #inv-table td 沒有設定 z-index，所以 .sl 的 z-index: 2 就能順利生效並壓過它們。

2. 為什麼左側「無灰影」？
當你的固定表頭 z-index 被降級並被滾動欄位壓在下方時，它的陰影自然也被滾動欄位的白色/淺紫色背景給「吃掉」了。另外，原本設定的 rgba(0,0,0,.08) 在視覺上太淡，很容易被忽略。

🛠️ 修正方案
請打開你的 kucun.html，找到 <style> 區塊，並替換以下幾行代碼：

修正 1：提高固定表頭的權重
找到原本的 th.sl 和 th.sr，把它們加上 #inv-table 的前綴，強制提升權重：

CSS
/* 將原本的 th.sl 與 th.sr 替換為以下這兩行 */
#inv-table th.sl { background:#F8F7FD; z-index:4; }
#inv-table th.sr { background:#F8F7FD; z-index:4; }
修正 2：加深並修正陰影顯示
找到 .sl-4 與 .sr 的設定，將陰影加深為 0.12，並將外推距離稍微拉長，確保它能跨越相鄰儲存格的邊界投射出來：

CSS
/* 將原本的 .sl-4 替換為以下 */
.sl-4 { left:510px; box-shadow: 6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }

/* 將原本的 .sr 替換為以下 */
.sr { position:sticky; right:0; z-index:2; background:white; box-shadow: -6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
💡 額外防呆建議（關於欄位推擠）
你的 .sl-4 (待收貨) 目前寫死了 left: 510px。這是基於前四個欄位 130 + 120 + 80 + 180 = 510 算出來的。

但在網頁表格中，如果「批號 / 效期」那一欄裡面的內容（例如按鈕或很長的批號字串）撐破了 180px 的寬度，它就會往右推擠。一旦它被撐到 200px，它就會跟寫死在 510px 的「待收貨」發生內部重疊。

如何避免這個隱患？
在你 JS 渲染表頭的地方，把前四個固定欄位的 style 加上 min-width 和 max-width，強制鎖死它們的寬度：

JavaScript
// 在 JS 中生成 theadHtml 的地方，強制鎖死寬度
let theadHtml = `
  <th class="sl sl-0" style="min-width:130px; max-width:130px;">品項</th>
  <th class="sl sl-1" style="min-width:120px; max-width:120px;">庫存 / 安全量</th>
  <th class="sl sl-2" style="min-width:80px; max-width:80px;">狀態</th>
  <th class="sl sl-3" style="min-width:180px; max-width:180px;">
    <span>批號 / 效期</span>
    <button class="lot-toggle-th-btn" onclick="toggleLots()" id="lot-toggle-btn">${lotToggleLabel}</button>
  </th>
  <th class="sl sl-4" style="min-width:90px; max-width:90px;">待收貨</th>
`;
（tbody 裡面的 td 不需要加，只要 th 鎖死了，同一欄的 td 就會乖乖跟著對齊。）

只要替換上述的 CSS 與鎖死寬度，你的表頭就不會再被吃掉，灰影也會漂亮地浮現出來了！可以直接貼上去測試看看。

**YOHOHO**（2026-05-10 10:46）：

這個分析非常精準！另一個 AI 找到了 CSS 權重（Specificity）陷阱，這才是根本原因。讓我解釋一下：

---

**核心問題：CSS 權重覆蓋了 z-index**

```css
/* 這行：ID(100) + 標籤(1) = 權重 101 */
#inv-table th { z-index:15; }

/* 這行：類別(10) + 標籤(1) = 權重 11 → 輸了！ */
th.sl { z-index:30; }  /* z-index:30 從未生效 */
```

`th.sl` 雖然寫了 `z-index:30`，但因為 `#inv-table th` 權重更高，固定欄頭實際上還是拿到 `z-index:15`，和日期欄頭同一層，DOM 後生成的就蓋上去了。

**解法就是升高選擇器權重**：改成 `#inv-table th.sl`（權重 111），就能穩穩壓過 `#inv-table th`（權重 101）。

| 無陰影 | 固定欄頭 z-index 和滾動欄頭一樣，陰影被蓋住 | 同上；另加深陰影 `0.08 → 0.12`，shadow 從 6px 拉到 10px |
| 欄位被撐寬 | th 只有 `width` 沒有鎖 `max-width` | 加上 `min-width` + `max-width` 雙鎖 |

**ZY**（2026-05-06 23:56）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session continues iterative UI refinement of `kucun.html` (庫存總覽) in the 培養液管理系統. The session covers v1.3.3 → v1.3.7 improvements.

**Round 1 (v1.3.4)**: User requested:
- Only show 7-8 date columns at once, rest behind scrollbar
- Move scrollbar to TOP of table (currently hard to find at bottom)
- Fix sticky header: disappears when scrolling down
- Status badges: remove "充足" and "無資料", only keep 注意/危急

**Round 2 (v1.3.5 attempt)**: User clarified:
- The problem is that ALL columns are being displayed at once, making the scrollbar useless
- "需要限縮它的寬度距離，捲軸才會出現" (need to constrain the width so the scrollbar appears)
- NOT about fixing individual column widths

**Round 3 (Critical clarification)**: User said:
- NOT a monitor resolution issue — they ZOOMED OUT Chrome to see everything
- 期間估計用量 should ALWAYS appear at the RIGHT EDGE of the viewport (sticky right) — but it doesn't
- Original design consensus: LEFT fixed columns + RIGHT fixed column + MIDDLE scrollable
- Asked whether this consensus has been achieved

**Approved final fix (v1.3.7)**:
- Give `.inv-wrap` `max-width:1300px` to force consistent horizontal overflow
- Give `.inv-wrap` `max-height:500px` (fixed, not viewport-relative) to force consistent vertical overflow
- Both changes ensure sticky behavior always triggers regardless of screen size or zoom

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- `position:sticky` behavior requires nearest scroll container ancestor (set by `overflow:auto/scroll/hidden`)
- `overflow:hidden` on ancestor (the white card) clips sticky elements that move outside ancestor bounds → caused header to become completely invisible in v1.3.5
- `overflow-y:clip` does not create a scroll container (unlike `overflow-y:auto/hidden`) — used to allow page-relative sticky, but was abandoned
- CSS sticky requires the element's container to actually OVERFLOW for sticky to trigger
- `width:100%` on table auto-fills the container width → table never overflows → no scrollbar → no sticky
- `width:max-content; min-width:100%` lets table take its natural width (wider than container when many event columns)
- Mirror scrollbar: a synchronized div above the table with `overflow-x:auto` showing the scrollbar at top
- Without `max-width` on `.inv-wrap`, the container inflates to full viewport, table always fits, ALL sticky behavior fails
- Corner sticky cells (intersection of row-sticky + col-sticky) need higher z-index (6) than regular headers (4)
- `table-layout:auto` (default): browser ignores `max-width` on `<th>` elements; explicit inline `width:80px` forces column widths

3. Files and Code Sections:

**`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (main file, v1.3.3 → v1.3.7 in progress)

Current CSS state (after latest edit, partial v1.3.7):
```css
/* Inventory table wrapper — KEY FIX */
.inv-wrap { overflow:auto; max-width:1300px; max-height:500px; border-radius:0 0 16px 16px; }

/* Table width — forces natural content width */
.inv-table { width:max-content; min-width:100%; border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; }

/* Sticky header row — relative to .inv-wrap container */
.inv-table th { position:sticky; top:0; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; color:#64748B; letter-spacing:.05em; padding:10px 12px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:2px solid #E2E4F4; white-space:nowrap; z-index:4; }

/* Corner cells (both top-sticky AND left/right-sticky) need higher z-index */
.inv-table th.s0,.inv-table th.s1,.inv-table th.s2,.inv-table th.s3,.inv-table th.s4,.inv-table th.s-right { z-index:6; }

/* Top scrollbar mirror — STILL NEEDS max-width:1300px */
#inv-scroll-mirror { overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; height:14px; background:#F8F7FD; border-bottom:1px solid #E2E4F4; }
#inv-scroll-mirror::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }
#inv-scroll-spacer { height:1px; }
```

Sticky column CSS (left side, 600px total):
```css
.inv-table th.s0,.inv-table td.s0 { position:sticky; left:0;     z-index:3; width:130px; min-width:130px; }
.inv-table th.s1,.inv-table td.s1 { position:sticky; left:130px; z-index:3; width:120px; min-width:120px; }
.inv-table th.s2,.inv-table td.s2 { position:sticky; left:250px; z-index:3; width:80px;  min-width:80px;  }
.inv-table th.s3,.inv-table td.s3 { position:sticky; left:330px; z-index:3; width:180px; min-width:180px; }
.inv-table th.s4,.inv-table td.s4 { position:sticky; left:510px; z-index:3; width:90px;  min-width:90px;  border-right:1.5px solid #E2E4F4; }
.inv-table th.s-right,.inv-table td.s-right { position:sticky; right:0; z-index:3; width:110px; min-width:110px; border-left:1.5px solid #E2E4F4; }
```

Status badge (simplified):
```javascript
function badgeHtml(status) {
  if (status === 'warn') return `<span class="badge b-warn">🟠 注意</span>`;
  if (status === 'crit') return `<span class="badge b-crit">🔴 危急</span>`;
  return '';
}
```

Event column header (inline width forces fixed-width columns):
```javascript
theadHtml += `<th class="cl-col-th" style="width:80px;min-width:80px;max-width:80px">
  <div class="font-bold text-slate-600">${M}/${D}</div>
  <span class="src-badge ${srcCls}" style="margin-top:2px;font-size:10px">${srcLbl}</span>
</th>`;
```

HTML structure (inside white card):
```html
<div class="md:hidden px-4 py-2 bg-amber-50 ...">左右滑動提示</div>
<div id="inv-scroll-mirror" class="hidden md:block"><div id="inv-scroll-spacer"></div></div>
<div class="inv-wrap" id="inv-wrap-inner">
  <table class="inv-table" id="inv-table">
    <thead><tr id="inv-thead-row"></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="inv-tbody"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

Mirror scrollbar sync JS:
```javascript
function initScrollSync() {
  const mirror = document.getElementById('inv-scroll-mirror');
  const wrap   = document.getElementById('inv-wrap-inner');
  const table  = document.getElementById('inv-table');
  if (!mirror || !wrap || !table) return;
  document.getElementById('inv-scroll-spacer').style.width = table.scrollWidth + 'px';
  mirror.onscroll = null; wrap.onscroll = null;
  mirror.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if (!mirror._lock) { wrap._lock=true; wrap.scrollLeft=mirror.scrollLeft; wrap._lock=false; } });
  wrap.addEventListener('scroll',   () => { if (!wrap._lock)   { mirror._lock=true; mirror.scrollLeft=wrap.scrollLeft; mirror._lock=false; } });
}
```

render() calls initScrollSync():
```javascript
function render() {
  ...
  if (hasAny) renderInventoryTable(cachedData);
  renderChangelog(cachedData);
  if (hasAny) initScrollSync();
}
```

**`C:\Users\User\.claude\plans\prd-beipan-html-gupan-html-order-html-j-vectorized-pancake.md`**
- Updated with Phase 3.5-R4 section documenting the v1.3.7 fix

4. Errors and Fixes:

**v1.3.5 Critical Bug — Header completely invisible**:
- Used `overflow-y:clip` + `position:sticky; top:56px`
- The card's `overflow:hidden` clips sticky elements that move outside the card's visual bounds when sticky activates relative to page
- Fix: Reverted to `overflow:auto` on `.inv-wrap` and `top:0` on `<th>` (sticky relative to container, not page)
- User: "全部都大錯特錯...表頭現在沒有正確顯示，而且無論我如何縮放螢幕，它都不會出現"

**Fundamental Design Misunderstanding — Root Cause of All Scroll Issues**:
- I repeatedly tried sticky/overflow-y approaches before identifying the core issue
- Root cause: no `max-width` on `.inv-wrap` → container inflates to full viewport → table always fits → no overflow → no scrollbar → no sticky
- Fix: `max-width:1300px` on `.inv-wrap`

**`max-height:calc(100vh - 240px)` too large on high-resolution screens**:
- On 1440p+ monitors, this could be 1200px+ which is larger than the product list height
- Fix: Changed to fixed `max-height:500px`

**HTML edit rejected mid-session**:
- User stopped an edit to the mirror scrollbar HTML to ask clarification about Issue 2C (the "3 瓶" display meaning)
- Had to re-apply the edit after clarification

**`old_string not found` error on lotsHtml edit**:
- After a rejected edit, file content didn't match expected string
- Fix: Re-read the file at the specific line range and used exact current content

5. Problem Solving:

**Horizontal scroll consistently present**: The core insight was that `max-width:1300px` on `.inv-wrap` means:
- Left sticky (600px) + visible event area (~590px = ~7 columns at 80px) + right sticky (110px) = 1300px total
- The table with 8+ event columns is always wider than 1300px → always overflows → scrollbar always appears
- This is viewport/zoom independent

**Right sticky column always visible**: With horizontal overflow guaranteed, `position:sticky; right:0` on 期間估計用量 works correctly — it always appears at the right edge of `.inv-wrap`

**Vertical sticky header**: With `max-height:500px` and 25+ products at ~40px/row = ~1000px of content > 500px → always overflow → `position:sticky; top:0` always sticks header at top of `.inv-wrap`

**Scrollbar position at top**: Mirror div (`#inv-scroll-mirror`, 14px high) placed above `.inv-wrap`, synced bidirectionally with JS. Both mirror and `.inv-wrap` need matching `max-width:1300px`.

**ZY**（2026-05-07 00:06）：

前三張圖是我試錯的結果。的確可能就像你說的，寬度是固定的，但它還是沒有符合我剛才的需求。

從下面更新紀錄的白框中，我得知這個白框也會隨著螢幕放大縮小而調整，但調整的幅度是有限的，這句話對不對？

第二個問題是，雖然我們限縮了寬度，但可以很明顯看到，右側「期間估計用量」的欄位並沒有貼著右邊，而是也被固定住了；它理應要貼著右邊才對。

接著，雖然我可以轉動捲軸，但感覺並沒有真正區分出左側、中間、右邊這三個明確的區塊。感覺部分內容有區別，但上面的標題卻沒有區別，導致捲軸的寬幅竟然從最左邊一直延伸到「期間估計用量」之前，有這麼長的 bar，但它其實應該只出現在中間才對。

所以我認為你並沒有明確地幫我切成三個部分：
1. 圖層關係
   如果存在上下層的關係，左側跟右側應該屬於上層圖層，中間則是下層圖層，這樣中間的部分在滾動時才會被遮住或擋住。
2. 切分方式
   我推測你並沒有真的把它切分成想像中的三個部分，或者標題與內容的切分方式有所差異，導致現在標題與內容的切分不一致。
3. 右側對齊
   右邊欄位其實不是貼著右邊，只是「看起來」在右邊，而不是「從右邊數過來」貼齊右側。

以上這些因素導致中間現在呈現很混亂的現象。你可以再告訴我，我說的對不對？我們可以再討論一下。

**YOHOHO**（2026-05-07 06:08）：

---

## 確認你的三個觀察

**第一點（白框跟著視窗調整）**：對。更新紀錄的白框是 `width:100%` 的容器，會隨視窗寬窄而伸縮。

---

**第二點（捲軸範圍太寬）**：對，而且更精確的說法是——因為現在是一張完整的 `<table>`，瀏覽器計算「可捲動範圍」時，把整張表從第一欄算到最後一欄。左側固定欄雖然視覺上不動，但它的寬度（600px）仍然計入捲軸的 track 長度。所以捲軸顯得特別長，這不是「看起來長」，是真的在追蹤錯誤的範圍。

---

**第三點（期間估計用量沒有真正貼右邊）**：對，而且找到真正的根本原因了。

目前的測試資料只有 4 個日期事件（5/1、5/3、5/6、5/8），4 欄 × 80px = 320px。加上左側 600px + 右側 110px，整張表只有 **1030px 寬**。但 `.inv-wrap` 的 `max-width` 設了 1300px，所以容器比表格更寬。

**表格沒有溢出容器 → 沒有捲軸 → `position:sticky; right:0` 根本不會觸發。**

那它為什麼「看起來在右邊」？因為它就是表格最後一欄，自然待在 1030px 的位置。但它不是「從右邊數 110px 固定住的」，只是剛好長在那裡。

---

## 根本問題

你說得非常準確：**我沒有真的切成三塊**。目前是用一張 `<table>` + CSS `position:sticky` 模擬出「看起來像三塊」的假象，但本質上它是一整體。這導致：

- 捲軸永遠追蹤全表寬度，無法只追蹤中間
- sticky 能不能觸發，取決於資料量（事件欄夠不夠多）
- 沒有圖層概念，左右欄無法真正「蓋在」中間上方

---

## 正確的做法：三個獨立容器

真正的修法是把 HTML 結構改成三個獨立的 `<div>`：

```
[左 div: 600px 固定][中 div: flex:1 獨立橫向捲動][右 div: 110px 固定]
```

- 左右各自是 `overflow:hidden`，不捲動
- 中間是 `overflow:auto`，有自己的捲軸（只覆蓋中間範圍）
- 縱向捲動：中間捲動時，JS 同步帶動左右 div 的 `scrollTop`
- 因為是三張獨立的 `<table>`，每行高度需要 JS 同步對齊

這是比較大的重構，但是徹底解決你說的三個問題。我把這個計畫整理進檔案，你確認後再開始執行。
