**`buildExpandRows()` function (~line 1234) — NEEDS UPDATE (edit FAILED):**

Current state is 5-column version using `expandRow()` helper. Needs to be replaced with:
```javascript
function cleanNote(note) {
  if (!note) return '';
  return note.replace(/[（(]\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}[）)]\s*$/, '').trim();
}

function expandRow4(c1, c2, c3, c4, extraClass) {
  const cls = extraClass ? `cl-expand-row ${extraClass}` : 'cl-expand-row';
  return `<div class="${cls}">
    <span class="font-medium text-slate-700 text-xs">${c1}</span>
    <span class="font-mono text-xs text-slate-400">${c2 || ''}</span>
    <span class="text-xs">${c3 || ''}</span>
    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">${c4 || ''}</span>
  </div>`;
}

function buildExpandRows(entries, src) {
  return entries.map(e => {
    const p    = PRODUCT_MAP[e.productId];
    const name = p?.name || e.productName || e.productId || '—';
    const qty  = e.qtyDelta ?? e.qty;
    const unit = e.unit || '瓶';
    const lot  = e.lotNumber || '';
    const baseNote = cleanNote(e.note);

    if (src === 'beipan') {
      const consumed = qty != null ? Math.abs(parseFloat(qty)) : null;
      const consumedStr = consumed != null ? `使用 ${consumed.toFixed(1)}mL` : '';
      const openedStr = (e.bottlesOpened > 0) ? `（開 ${e.bottlesOpened} 瓶）` : '';
      const col3 = consumedStr
        ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${consumedStr}${openedStr}</span>` : '';
      const openExpStr = e.openExpiryDate ? `開封後到期 ${e.openExpiryDate}` : '';
      const col4 = [baseNote, openExpStr].filter(Boolean).join('；') || '—';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, col4);
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'receive') {
      const col3 = qty > 0 ? `<span class="text-emerald-600 font-semibold">+${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      const expStr = e.expiryDate ? `效期 ${e.expiryDate}` : '';
      const noteClean = baseNote.replace(/^進貨$/, '').trim();
      const col4 = [expStr, noteClean].filter(Boolean).join('｜') || '—';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, col4);
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'void') {
      const col3 = qty != null ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, baseNote || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'edit') {
      return expandRow4(name, lot, '—', baseNote || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'pandian') {
      const col3 = qty != null ? `<span class="text-slate-600 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      const operator = e.operator || baseNote.replace(/^盤點[：:]\s*/, '').replace(/^盤點$/, '').trim();
      return expandRow4(name, '', col3, operator || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'order') {
      const col3 = qty > 0 ? `訂購 ${qty} ${unit}` : '—';
      const vendor = e.vendor || (baseNote.match(/廠商[：:]\s*([^；（\s]+)/)?.[1] || '');
      return expandRow4(
        `<span class="text-slate-400">${name}</span>`,
        '',
        `<span class="text-slate-400 font-medium">${col3}</span>`,
        `<span class="text-slate-400">${vendor || '—'}</span>`,
        'order-row'
      );
    }

    // manual / fallback
    const col3 = qty > 0 ? `<span class="text-emerald-600 font-semibold">+${qty} ${unit}</span>`
               : qty < 0 ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
    const manualNote = baseNote
      .replace(/手動記錄(?:使用)?\s*[\d.]+\s*[瓶mL]+/gi, '')
      .replace(/^[;；,，\s]+|[;；,，\s]+$/g, '').trim();
    return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, manualNote || '—');
  }).join('');
```
```javascript
}
```

檔名維持：台北胚胎室_庫存快照_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv。

新增『匯出區間日誌』 (Export Transaction Log)：

請在下方「更新紀錄 (Changelog)」區塊的『日期區間選擇器』右側，新增一個按鈕 <button class="cl-quick-btn">匯出區間日誌</button>。

建立一個新的函數 exportChangelogCSV()。

將原本用來匯出 log 的舊 exportCSV() 邏輯移到這裡，並且必須套用畫面上已選的日期區間篩選 (cl-date-from, cl-date-to) 以及來源篩選 (clFilter)。

檔名格式：台北胚胎室_異動日誌_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv。

任務二：擴充 Changelog 篩選器條件 (Filter)
目前的篩選按鈕種類不夠。請更新 HTML 的篩選按鈕列與 setCLFilter 的邏輯，使其支援同時過濾特定的 action 或 source。請改為以下按鈕：

全部 (不過濾)

進貨 (source === 'jinhuo' 且 action === 'receive')

備盤 (source === 'beipan')

盤點 (source === 'pandian')

訂貨 (source === 'order')

手動使用 (source === 'manual' 且 action === 'use')

異常/作廢 (action === 'void' || action === 'discard')

修改/調整 (action === 'edit' || action === 'adjust')

任務三：消除盤點 (pandian) 的備註贅字
在 buildExpandRows 處理 src === 'pandian' 時，目前 col4 會把操作人名字印出來（例如：盤點：曾OO），但這與主列右側的操作人欄位重複了。

請修改邏輯：將 noteClean 裡面類似 盤點：曾OO 或 盤點：高任佑 的字眼用 Regex 清除（例如 replace(/盤點[：:]\s*[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z]+/g, '')）。

如果清除後為空字串，col4 請直接顯示 —。

請提供修改後的 exportCSV, 新增的 exportChangelogCSV, 更新後的 setCLFilter 以及對應的 HTML 和 buildExpandRows 程式碼。」

💡 提示詞背後的用意：
強制拆分： 我讓 AI 明確知道總表的 CSV 只能印「欄位狀態（庫存、待收貨）」，而下方的 CSV 才能印「歷史過程」。

連動篩選器： 特別交代 AI 在匯出「異動日誌」時，必須套用你選好的日期區間，這樣你就不會每次都載下一大包幾千筆的資料了。

擴充篩選按鈕： 將你提到的「作廢、修改、廢棄」透過 action 的屬性整合進了篩選列，以後查帳會非常方便。

**ZY**（2026-05-10 21:09）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session had three main phases of work:

**A) kucun.html Sticky Column Layout Fixes (3 rounds)**
- Round 1: Recalibrate left/right sticky column widths and `left`/`right` CSS offsets to match actual pixel sums
- Round 2: Comprehensive overhaul — add `table-layout:fixed`, `width:max-content`, bulletproof `!important` backgrounds and z-index, clean up theadHtml inline styles
- Round 3: Remove shadow from `.sr` (only `.sr-1` keeps shadow), fix group-row HTML (was collapsing right sticky cells into colspan), add `box-sizing:border-box`, add group-row sticky cell z-index

**B) Manual Log Modal Operator Field**
- Add `操作人 *` required input next to `原因分類` using grid-cols-2 layout in #log-modal
- Add validation in submitLog(), write operator to changelog entry, clear on close

**C) Phase 1.5 Architecture Refactor (Plan + Full Execution)**
- Extend shared.js to v2.0.0 as Single Source of Truth
- 47 PRODUCTS entries each get 8 new fields: gupanId, target, reorderQty, bottleVol, openExpiryDays, needQC, location, orderNote
- Fix beipan.html ID conflict (embryoglue → glue)
- Update kucun.html pandian/order lookups to use gupanId
- Replace gupan.html STOCK_GROUPS hardcode with dynamic generation
- Replace order.html ORDER_CONFIG/MEDIUM_CONFIG hardcode with dynamic generation
- User decisions confirmed: `needed` stays in beipan.html; 102(磊柏)=gupanId:'f-102', 102(明美)=gupanId:'f-102-mm'

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **CSS Sticky Columns**: `position:sticky`, `z-index` layering, `table-layout:fixed`, `width:max-content`, `!important` overrides for background/z-index
- **Mirror Scrollbar**: `.inv-mirror` div with margin-left/right matching exact sticky column widths
- **Group Row Sticky Fix**: group-row must have explicit `<td class="sr-1">` and `<td class="sr">` rather than collapsed colspan
- **shared.js Single Source of Truth**: PRODUCTS array as canonical product master, PRODUCT_MAP, GUPAN_MAP, REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS all derived from it
- **gupanId field**: Maps canonical product IDs (e.g., `givf`) to gupan.html/pandian-history prefixed IDs (e.g., `m-givf`, `f-102`, `c1-3w`)
- **Dynamic config generation**: ORDER_CONFIG, MEDIUM_CONFIG, STOCK_GROUPS all generated at runtime from PRODUCTS
- **VENDOR_META**: Vendor-level contact/leadtime data kept separate from PRODUCTS (not product-level attributes)
- **localStorage keys**: `kucun-changelog`, `pandian-history`, `pandian-result`, `beipan-result`, `jinhuo-records`, `order-result`
- **ID Conflict Resolution**: 102(磊柏)=`f-102`, 102(明美)=`f-102-mm` (new; previously both mapped to `f-102`)

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (v2.2.1)
  - Multiple CSS sticky column fixes across 3 rounds
  - Final CSS sticky section:
    ```css
    #inv-table { border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; width:max-content; min-width:100%; table-layout:fixed; }
    .sl { position:sticky; z-index:20; }
    .sl-0 { left:0;    width:140px; min-width:140px; max-width:140px; }
    .sl-1 { left:140px; width:80px;  min-width:80px;  max-width:80px;  text-align:center; }
    .sl-2 { left:220px; width:80px;  min-width:80px;  max-width:80px;  text-align:center; }
    .sl-3 { left:300px; width:90px;  min-width:90px;  max-width:90px;  text-align:center; box-shadow:6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
    .sr-1 { position:sticky; right:110px; z-index:20; width:100px; min-width:100px; max-width:100px; text-align:center; box-shadow:-6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
    .sr   { position:sticky; right:0;     z-index:20; width:110px; min-width:110px; max-width:110px; text-align:center; box-shadow:none; }
    #inv-table th, #inv-table td { box-sizing:border-box; }
    #inv-table th.sl, #inv-table th.sr-1, #inv-table th.sr { background-color:#F8F7FD !important; z-index:30 !important; }
    #inv-table td.sl, #inv-table td.sr-1, #inv-table td.sr { background-color:white !important; z-index:20 !important; }
    #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sl, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr-1, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr { background-color:#FAFAFA !important; }
    #inv-table tr.group-row td.sl, #inv-table tr.group-row td.sr-1, #inv-table tr.group-row td.sr { background-color:#F1F5F9 !important; z-index:25 !important; }
    .inv-mirror { margin-left:390px; margin-right:210px; }
    ```
  - group-row HTML fixed to explicit cells:
    ```javascript
    const midSpan = Math.max(cols.length, 1);
    tbodyRows.push(`<tr class="group-row">
      <td class="sl sl-0">${groupKey}</td>
      <td class="sl sl-1"></td>
      <td class="sl sl-2"></td>
      <td class="sl sl-3"></td>
      <td colspan="${midSpan}"></td>
      <td class="sr-1"></td>
      <td class="sr"></td>
    </tr>`);
    ```
  - calcProductInfo() pandian/order lookups updated:
    ```javascript
    const pandianItem = product.gupanId
      ? pandian?.allValues?.find(v => v.id === product.gupanId)
      : null;
    const orderItem = product.gupanId
      ? order?.orders?.find(o => o.itemId === product.gupanId)
      : null;
    ```
  - #log-modal operator field added (HTML grid-cols-2 with `log-operator` input)
  - submitLog() operator validation + entry field + cleanup

    ```javascript
    { id:'givf', name:'G-IVF', vendor:'亞樸', unit:'瓶', group:'培養液', gtin:'07350025910550', gupanId:'m-givf', target:2, reorderQty:12, bottleVol:60, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:false, location:'培養箱', orderNote:null },
    { id:'102', name:'102（磊柏）', vendor:'磊柏', unit:'盒', group:'試劑', gtin:'04589700012200', gupanId:'f-102', target:2, reorderQty:60, bottleVol:null, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:true, location:'冰箱', orderNote:'月點料 · 亦可向明美訂購' },
    { id:'102-mm', name:'102（明美）', vendor:'明美', unit:'盒', group:'試劑', gtin:null, gupanId:'f-102-mm', target:2, reorderQty:20, bottleVol:null, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:true, location:'冰箱', orderNote:'月點料 · 亦可向磊柏訂購' },
    ```
  - New derived constants:
    ```javascript
    const REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS = PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.needQC).map(p => p.id); // ['101','102','102-mm']
    const GUPAN_MAP = Object.fromEntries(PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.gupanId).map(p => [p.gupanId, p]));
    ```

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\gupan.html`**
  - Removed 94-line hardcoded STOCK_GROUPS, replaced with:
    ```javascript
    const LOCATION_ORDER = ['培養箱','冰箱','櫃1','櫃2','櫃3','精蟲室','半年一次','需要再叫'];
    const LOCATION_ICONS = { '培養箱':'🧪','冰箱':'🧊','櫃1':'🗄️','櫃2':'🗄️','櫃3':'🗄️','精蟲室':'🔬','半年一次':'📅','需要再叫':'🔔' };
    const LOCATION_COLLAPSED_SET = new Set(['培養箱','半年一次','需要再叫']);
    const STOCK_GROUPS = (() => {
      const grouped = {};
      PRODUCTS.forEach(p => {
        if (!p.gupanId || !p.location) return;
        if (!grouped[p.location]) grouped[p.location] = [];
        grouped[p.location].push({ id:p.gupanId, name:p.name, unit:p.unit, target:p.target||0 });
      });
      return LOCATION_ORDER.filter(loc => grouped[loc]).map(loc => ({
        id: loc.replace(/[^a-z0-9一-鿿]/gi, '-').toLowerCase(),
        label: loc, icon: LOCATION_ICONS[loc]||'📦',
        collapsed: LOCATION_COLLAPSED_SET.has(loc),
        items: grouped[loc],
      }));
    })();
    ```

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\order.html`**
  - Removed hardcoded MEDIUM_CONFIG + ORDER_CONFIG (~80 lines), replaced with:
    ```javascript
    const VENDOR_META = {
      '弘優': { contact:'小花 / Summer', leadtime:'1–2 週' },
      '亞樸': { contact:'Edward',        leadtime:'2–3 週' },
      '億宸': { contact:'Raphael',       leadtime:'1–2 週' },
      '磊柏': { contact:'Sherry Peng',   leadtime:'約 1 個月' },
      '明美': { contact:'Eric',          leadtime:'當天到' },
    };
    const ORDER_CONFIG = (() => {
      const vendorMap = {};
      PRODUCTS.forEach(p => {
        if (!p.gupanId) return;
        const v = p.vendor;
        if (!vendorMap[v]) vendorMap[v] = [];
        vendorMap[v].push({ itemId:p.gupanId, orderId:p.gupanId, name:p.name, unit:p.unit, target:p.target||0, reorderQty:p.reorderQty, note:p.orderNote||'' });
      });
      return Object.entries(vendorMap).filter(([v]) => VENDOR_META[v]).map(([vendor, items]) => ({ vendor, contact: VENDOR_META[vendor].contact, leadtime: VENDOR_META[vendor].leadtime, items }));
    })();
    const MEDIUM_CONFIG = ORDER_CONFIG
      .map(g => ({ ...g, items: g.items.filter(i => GUPAN_MAP[i.itemId]?.group === '培養液') }))
      .filter(g => g.items.length > 0);
    ```
  - orderId is now unified as gupanId (previously had mixed formats like `f-102-lb`, `f-102-mm`)
  - `document.getElementById('inp-' + it.orderId)` still works because orderId = gupanId and input IDs are generated the same way

---

4. Errors and Fixes:

- **group-row colspan collapsing right sticky cells**: Used `colspan="${midRightSpan}"` (midSpan + 1) which swallowed the right sticky cells, causing visual breakage. Fixed by using `colspan="${midSpan}"` for middle only, then adding explicit `<td class="sr-1"></td>` and `<td class="sr"></td>`.

- **Sticky columns misaligning due to table auto-sizing**: Root cause was `width:100%` without `table-layout:fixed` allowed table to auto-resize columns. Fixed by adding `table-layout:fixed; width:max-content; min-width:100%` and triple-locking widths (width/min-width/max-width) in CSS.

- **Background transparency causing overlap visual glitches**: CSS specificity wasn't high enough to override hover states. Fixed by adding `!important` to all sticky td/th background-color rules using high-specificity selectors like `#inv-table td.sl`.

- **`.sr` had box-shadow causing double shadow**: User caught this — only `.sr-1` (預計可撐天數) should have left shadow, `.sr` (期間估計用量) should have none. Fixed `.sr { box-shadow:none; }`.

---

5. Problem Solving:

- **ID mapping between pages**: The core architectural problem was that gupan.html uses prefixed IDs (m-, f-, c1-, c2-, c3-, s-, b-, r-) while jinhuo/kucun use canonical IDs. Solved by adding `gupanId` field to PRODUCTS, allowing kucun.html to look up `product.gupanId` instead of constructing `m-${product.id}`.

- **102(磊柏) vs 102(明美) conflict**: Both previously mapped to gupanId `f-102`. Resolved by creating a new gupanId `f-102-mm` for 明美, and updating gupan.html to show both as separate items.

- **EmbryoGlue ID mismatch**: beipan.html used `embryoglue` internally while shared.js used `glue`. Resolved by changing beipan.html to `glue`.

- **order.html orderId format**: Previously had custom suffixes like `f-102-lb` and `f-102-mm`. After refactor, orderId is unified to gupanId. The `document.getElementById('inp-' + it.orderId)` pattern continues to work since both input rendering and reading use the same orderId value.

---

**ZY**（2026-05-10 17:01）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

ZY (高任佑, IVF embryologist) is building a 培養液管理系統 (Culture Media Management System). This session continued Phase 4C-R: fixing the changelog accordion UI in kucun.html after the user identified problems with the v2.2.1 implementation.

**User's specific requests:**
- Fix 3 types of information redundancy: (1) Badge + event name text duplicate, (2) sub-row notes repeat action/date, (3) "盤點","進貨","手動記錄使用N瓶" still showing in notes
- Fix CSS alignment ("太平洋" empty space problem) — change from proportional flex to fixed-pixel grid
- 4-column layout: 品名(140px) | 批號(100px) | 消耗/數量(160px) | 備註(1fr auto-wrap)
- Integrate bottlesOpened into Col3: "使用 15.1mL（開 1 瓶）"
- Col4 (備註) must auto word-wrap (not clip), with `align-items:start` for grid container
- Read `bottlesOpened` directly from changelog entry (NOT calculate it — it's already stored by beipan.html's submitBeipan())
- Desired per-source formats:
  - 備盤: 品名｜批號｜使用?mL（開?瓶）｜備註+開封後到期日
  - 進貨: 品名｜批號｜+N瓶｜效期｜到貨狀態
  - 盤點: 品名｜N瓶｜操作人
  - 訂貨: 品名｜訂購N瓶(灰底)｜廠商
  - 作廢/修改: 品名｜批號｜數量｜原因/明細

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **kucun-changelog**: localStorage key storing all inventory events with schema: `{id, ts, source, action, productId, productName, lotNumber, expiryDate, openExpiryDate, qtyDelta, unit, bottlesOpened, operator, note}`
- **Accordion changelog UI**: Groups entries by `ts|source` key, collapsed rows + expandable detail rows
- **CSS Grid fixed columns**: `grid-template-columns: 140px 100px 160px 1fr` with `align-items:start`
- **Column wrapping rules**: col1-3 = `white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis`; col4 = `white-space:normal; word-break:break-word; line-height:1.6`
- **bottlesOpened**: Stored directly in changelog by `beipan.html`'s `submitBeipan()` during submission — NOT to be calculated/inferred
- **cleanNote()**: Removes trailing `（YYYY-MM-DD）` or `(YYYY-MM-DD)` from note strings
- **Note cleanup per source**: 盤點 strips "盤點：" prefix; jinhuo/receive strips bare "進貨"; manual strips "手動記錄使用N瓶"
- **qtyDelta for beipan**: Negative number (consumed mL), use `Math.abs()` to display as positive "使用 Xmml"
- **Old format vs new format**: Old beipan `qty` = remaining total (positive); New `qtyDelta` = consumed (negative). Always use `e.qtyDelta ?? e.qty`

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

**`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (v2.2.1)
- Most critical file. Multiple changes in this session.

**CSS changes (line ~145) — ALREADY APPLIED ✓:**
```css
/* Changed FROM: */
.cl-expand-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1.5fr 1.5fr 1fr 3fr; gap:0 6px; align-items:baseline; ... }
.cl-expand-row.order-row { background:#F8FAFF; border-radius:4px; color:#94A3B8; }

/* Changed TO: */
.cl-expand-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:140px 100px 160px 1fr; gap:0 8px; align-items:start; padding:5px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #F1F5F9; font-size:12.5px; }
.cl-expand-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
.cl-expand-row.order-row { background:#F8FAFF; border-radius:4px; }
/* col1-3：不換行，超長省略 */
.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(1),.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(2),.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(3) { white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; }
/* col4（備註）：自動換行 */
.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(4) { white-space:normal; word-break:break-word; line-height:1.6; }
```

**Main row change (line ~1219) — ALREADY APPLIED ✓:**
```javascript
// Removed this span:
<span class="text-slate-700 text-sm font-medium ml-2">${grpLbl}</span>
// Main row now only: Badge + time + 共N項 + chevron
```

**`buildExpandRows()` function (~line 1234) — NEEDS UPDATE (edit FAILED):**

Current state is 5-column version using `expandRow()` helper. Needs to be replaced with:
```javascript
function cleanNote(note) {
  if (!note) return '';
  return note.replace(/[（(]\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}[）)]\s*$/, '').trim();
}

function expandRow4(c1, c2, c3, c4, extraClass) {
  const cls = extraClass ? `cl-expand-row ${extraClass}` : 'cl-expand-row';
  return `<div class="${cls}">
    <span class="font-medium text-slate-700 text-xs">${c1}</span>
    <span class="font-mono text-xs text-slate-400">${c2 || ''}</span>
    <span class="text-xs">${c3 || ''}</span>
    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">${c4 || ''}</span>
  </div>`;
}

function buildExpandRows(entries, src) {
  return entries.map(e => {
    const p    = PRODUCT_MAP[e.productId];
    const name = p?.name || e.productName || e.productId || '—';
    const qty  = e.qtyDelta ?? e.qty;
    const unit = e.unit || '瓶';
    const lot  = e.lotNumber || '';
    const baseNote = cleanNote(e.note);

    if (src === 'beipan') {
      const consumed = qty != null ? Math.abs(parseFloat(qty)) : null;
      const consumedStr = consumed != null ? `使用 ${consumed.toFixed(1)}mL` : '';
      const openedStr = (e.bottlesOpened > 0) ? `（開 ${e.bottlesOpened} 瓶）` : '';
      const col3 = consumedStr
        ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${consumedStr}${openedStr}</span>` : '';
      const openExpStr = e.openExpiryDate ? `開封後到期 ${e.openExpiryDate}` : '';
      const col4 = [baseNote, openExpStr].filter(Boolean).join('；') || '—';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, col4);
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'receive') {
      const col3 = qty > 0 ? `<span class="text-emerald-600 font-semibold">+${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      const expStr = e.expiryDate ? `效期 ${e.expiryDate}` : '';
      const noteClean = baseNote.replace(/^進貨$/, '').trim();
      const col4 = [expStr, noteClean].filter(Boolean).join('｜') || '—';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, col4);
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'void') {
      const col3 = qty != null ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, baseNote || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'edit') {
      return expandRow4(name, lot, '—', baseNote || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'pandian') {
      const col3 = qty != null ? `<span class="text-slate-600 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      const operator = e.operator || baseNote.replace(/^盤點[：:]\s*/, '').replace(/^盤點$/, '').trim();
      return expandRow4(name, '', col3, operator || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'order') {
      const col3 = qty > 0 ? `訂購 ${qty} ${unit}` : '—';
      const vendor = e.vendor || (baseNote.match(/廠商[：:]\s*([^；（\s]+)/)?.[1] || '');
      return expandRow4(
        `<span class="text-slate-400">${name}</span>`,
        '',
        `<span class="text-slate-400 font-medium">${col3}</span>`,
        `<span class="text-slate-400">${vendor || '—'}</span>`,
        'order-row'
      );
    }

    // manual / fallback
    const col3 = qty > 0 ? `<span class="text-emerald-600 font-semibold">+${qty} ${unit}</span>`
               : qty < 0 ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
    const manualNote = baseNote
      .replace(/手動記錄(?:使用)?\s*[\d.]+\s*[瓶mL]+/gi, '')
      .replace(/^[;；,，\s]+|[;；,，\s]+$/g, '').trim();
    return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, manualNote || '—');
  }).join('');
}
```

**ZY**（2026-05-10 17:28）：

[📄 ZY 在 IDE 開啟了 kucun.html]

「你把『庫存快照』跟『異動日誌』的 CSV 匯出邏輯搞混了！目前右上角的『匯出庫存快照』按鈕，匯出的內容居然是底下的交易明細，這是不對的。同時，盤點的備註也有資訊重複的問題。

請嚴格依照以下指示，進行三大核心修復：

任務一：徹底拆分『庫存快照』與『異動日誌』的 CSV 匯出功能

修復『匯出庫存快照』 (Export Snapshot)：

維持右上角的按鈕，但請重寫 exportCSV() 函數。

這個函數必須去抓取上方庫存總表的當前狀態（讀取 products 與 productInfoCache 計算出的結果）。

CSV 欄位必須是：品項分類、品項名稱、廠商、目前庫存(庫存數+單位)、狀態(如：危急/充足)、待收貨數量、預計可撐天數、期間估計用量。

檔名維持：台北胚胎室_庫存快照_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv。

新增『匯出區間日誌』 (Export Transaction Log)：

請在下方「更新紀錄 (Changelog)」區塊的『日期區間選擇器』右側，新增一個按鈕 <button class="cl-quick-btn">匯出區間日誌</button>。

建立一個新的函數 exportChangelogCSV()。

將原本用來匯出 log 的舊 exportCSV() 邏輯移到這裡，並且必須套用畫面上已選的日期區間篩選 (cl-date-from, cl-date-to) 以及來源篩選 (clFilter)。

檔名格式：台北胚胎室_異動日誌_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv。

任務二：擴充 Changelog 篩選器條件 (Filter)
目前的篩選按鈕種類不夠。請更新 HTML 的篩選按鈕列與 setCLFilter 的邏輯，使其支援同時過濾特定的 action 或 source。請改為以下按鈕：

全部 (不過濾)

進貨 (source === 'jinhuo' 且 action === 'receive')

備盤 (source === 'beipan')

盤點 (source === 'pandian')

訂貨 (source === 'order')

手動使用 (source === 'manual' 且 action === 'use')

異常/作廢 (action === 'void' || action === 'discard')

修改/調整 (action === 'edit' || action === 'adjust')

任務三：消除盤點 (pandian) 的備註贅字
在 buildExpandRows 處理 src === 'pandian' 時，目前 col4 會把操作人名字印出來（例如：盤點：曾OO），但這與主列右側的操作人欄位重複了。

請修改邏輯：將 noteClean 裡面類似 盤點：曾OO 或 盤點：高任佑 的字眼用 Regex 清除（例如 replace(/盤點[：:]\s*[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z]+/g, '')）。

如果清除後為空字串，col4 請直接顯示 —。

請提供修改後的 exportCSV, 新增的 exportChangelogCSV, 更新後的 setCLFilter 以及對應的 HTML 和 buildExpandRows 程式碼。」

**ZY**（2026-05-10 18:59）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session continued the 培養液管理系統 (Culture Media Management System) project. Key requests in this session:

a) **Fix `buildExpandRows()` rewrite** (carried over from previous session where Edit failed): Replace 5-column grid with 4-column grid (`expandRow()` → `expandRow4()`), with per-source note cleanup.

b) **Fix `✓` in inventory table cells**: Replace hardcoded checkmarks for beipan/pandian with real values — pandian: `= N 瓶` (green), beipan: `-N 瓶` if bottlesOpened > 0, gray dot if 0; jinhuo: `+N` (blue); order: `N` (gray, no sign).

c) **Fix beipan note cleanup regex**: User provided correct regex — only remove `扣除 XXXmL[...];` prefix, preserve `剩餘 XmL，未開 N 瓶`; use ` ｜ ` separator.

d) **Three major tasks** (CSV split + filter expansion + pandian note fix):
   - Split `exportCSV()` into snapshot vs. changelog versions
   - Add "匯出區間日誌" button with `exportChangelogCSV()` applying current filters
   - Expand filter buttons from 5 to 8 (adding 訂貨, 手動使用, 異常/作廢, 修改/調整)
   - Fix pandian col4 removing "盤點：XXX" operator name redundancy

e) **Phase 4D plan**: QC Status Tracking — with user corrections: REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS=['102'] only; use `action:'qc_pass'`; `prompt()` for operator; add KPI filter linkage.

f) **Architecture refactor (shared.js)**: Paused Phase 4D to first unify PRODUCTS across 5 HTML files. Key: add `102（明美）` as `id:'102-mm'`; add `gupanId` field; maintain backward compat. To be done in new session.

g) **Restore 預計可撐天數 column**: User discovered the Days of Inventory column was removed; requested it be added back to the right-side sticky area.

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **kucun-changelog schema**: `{id, ts, source, action, productId, productName, lotNumber, expiryDate, openExpiryDate, qtyDelta, unit, bottlesOpened, operator, note}`
- **4-column CSS grid for changelog expand rows**: `grid-template-columns: 140px 100px 160px 1fr; align-items:start`
- **matchesCLFilter(e, f)**: Composite filter using `source:action` format; `:void` matches void+discard; `:edit` matches edit+adjust
- **productInfoCache**: Pre-calculated per-product info from `calcProductInfo()`
- **calcDoI()**: Days of Inventory = stockNum / (estUsage / periodDays)
- **calcEstUsage()**: pandian-history based usage estimation
- **PRODUCT_MAP**: `Object.fromEntries(PRODUCTS.map(p => [p.id, p]))` for fast lookup
- **gupanId field**: Maps canonical IDs to gupan.html's prefixed IDs (f-, m-, c1-, etc.) for pandian-history compatibility
- **Sticky right columns**: `.sr-1` at `right:110px`, `.sr` at `right:0`; z-index 20/30 for td/th
- **localStorage keys**: `jinhuo-records`, `pandian-history`, `pandian-result`, `beipan-result`, `kucun-changelog`, `order-result`

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (v2.2.1 — primary file)
  
  **CSS additions (lines ~64-70)**:
  ```css
  .sr-1 { position:sticky; right:110px; z-index:20; background-color:white; box-shadow:-6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
  #inv-table th.sr-1 { background-color:#F8F7FD; z-index:30; }
  #inv-table tbody tr:hover .sr-1 { background-color:#FAFAFA; }
  .sr { position:sticky; right:0; z-index:20; background-color:white; box-shadow:-1px 0 0 0 #E2E4F4; }
  ```

  **buildExpandRows() — 4-column version (lines ~1242-1370)**:
  ```javascript
  function expandRow4(c1, c2, c3, c4, extraClass) {
    const cls = extraClass ? `cl-expand-row ${extraClass}` : 'cl-expand-row';
    return `<div class="${cls}">
      <span class="font-medium text-slate-700 text-xs">${c1}</span>
      <span class="font-mono text-xs text-slate-400">${c2 || ''}</span>
      <span class="text-xs">${c3 || ''}</span>
      <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">${c4 || ''}</span>
    </div>`;
  }
  ```

  **beipan note cleanup (in buildExpandRows)**:
  ```javascript
  let noteClean = baseNote.replace(/扣除[\d.]+mL[^；]*[；;]\s*/g, '').trim();
  const col4 = [noteClean, openExpStr].filter(Boolean).join(' ｜ ') || '—';
  ```

  **pandian note cleanup (in buildExpandRows)**:
  ```javascript
  const noteClean = baseNote
    .replace(/盤點[：:]\s*[一-龥a-zA-Z\s]+/g, '')
    .replace(/^[;；,，\s]+|[;；,，\s]+$/g, '').trim();
  return expandRow4(name, '', col3, noteClean || '—');
  ```

  **Cell rendering in renderInventoryTable (qtyHtml logic)**:
  ```javascript
  const S = 'font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px';
  if (g.source === 'pandian') {
    qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:#059669">= ${fmtNum(pandianQty)} 瓶</div>`;
  } else if (g.source === 'beipan') {
    if (totalOpened > 0) qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:#DC2626">-${totalOpened} 瓶</div>`;
    // 0 → gray dot (default)
  } else if (g.source === 'order') {
    qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:#94A3B8">${fmtNum(Math.abs(totalQty))}</div>`;
  } else if (g.source === 'jinhuo') {
    const sign = totalQty > 0 ? '+' : '-';
    const clr = totalQty > 0 ? '#2563EB' : '#DC2626';
    qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:${clr}">${sign}${fmtNum(Math.abs(totalQty))}</div>`;
  } else { // manual/fallback: same as jinhuo format }
  ```

  **matchesCLFilter() function**:
  ```javascript
  function matchesCLFilter(e, f) {
    if (!f) return true;
    const [src, act] = f.split(':');
    const srcOk = !src || e.source === src;
    let actOk = true;
    if (act) {
      if (act === 'void') actOk = e.action === 'void' || e.action === 'discard';
      else if (act === 'edit') actOk = e.action === 'edit' || e.action === 'adjust';
      else actOk = e.action === act;
    }
    return srcOk && actOk;
  }
  ```

  **exportCSV() — now exports inventory snapshot**:
  - Reads `PRODUCTS` + `productInfoCache`
  - Columns: 品項分類, 品項名稱, 廠商, 目前庫存, 狀態, 待收貨數量, 預計可撐天數, 期間估計用量
  - Filename: `台北胚胎室_庫存快照_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv`

  **exportChangelogCSV() — new function**:
  - Applies `clFilter` via `matchesCLFilter()` + date range filters
  - Same columns as old exportCSV (日期, 時間, 來源, 操作, 品項, 批號, 效期, 數量, 單位, 操作人, 備註)
  - Filename: `台北胚胎室_異動日誌_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv`

  **Filter buttons HTML (8 buttons)**:
  ```html
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f="" onclick="setCLFilter('')">全部</button>
  ```

---

4. Errors and Fixes:

- **Edit failed "String to replace not found"** (carried from previous session): The `buildExpandRows()` function text in file didn't match what was specified. Fix: Read exact lines 1237-1311 first, then used exact content as `old_string`. Resolved successfully.

- **"使用 107.0mL" showing wrong value**: Old localStorage data from previous session. Not a code bug — user needed to click "載入測試資料" to refresh. Explained and resolved.

- **beipan note producing `扣除 12.0mL（）；剩餘 18.0mL，；`**: The multi-step regex was too aggressive (removing `剩餘...未開...` parts). User provided correct single-regex fix that only removes the `扣除 XXXmL[...];` prefix.

---

5. Problem Solving:

- **ID inconsistency across 5 HTML files**: Core architectural problem. Solved with plan to add `gupanId` field to canonical PRODUCTS, keeping backward compat for localStorage keys.
- **102（明美）missing from 4 of 5 pages**: Will be added as `id:'102-mm'` in shared.js.
- **Filter granularity**: Composite `source:action` filter key solves need to filter both by source (beipan) and by action (void, edit) independently.
- **CSV confusion**: Right-click "匯出庫存快照" was exporting changelog data. Fixed by fully separating the two export functions.

**ZY**（2026-05-10 19:07）：

「目前 kucun.html 的庫存總表在滑動時，發生了嚴重的『固定欄位 (Sticky) 偏移重疊』以及『表頭背景透明導致破圖』的問題。這肇因於 table 的自動撐寬特性，以及 z-index/背景色沒有嚴格覆蓋。

請嚴格按照以下指示，全面覆寫 CSS 區塊並清理 HTML 結構：

任務一：強制表格佈局與左右欄位精確寬度
請在 <style> 中更新 #inv-table 與所有的 .sl、.sr 寬度與定位：

CSS
/* 1. 強制表格不准自動撐寬 */
#inv-table { border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; width: max-content; min-width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; }

/* 2. 左側固定欄位 (寬度總和: 140+80+80=300) */
.sl-0 { left: 0; width: 140px; min-width: 140px; max-width: 140px; }
.sl-1 { left: 140px; width: 80px; min-width: 80px; max-width: 80px; text-align: center; }
.sl-2 { left: 220px; width: 80px; min-width: 80px; max-width: 80px; text-align: center; }
.sl-3 { left: 300px; width: 90px; min-width: 90px; max-width: 90px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }

/* 3. 右側固定欄位 (寬度總和: 100+110=210) */
.sr-1 { right: 110px; width: 100px; min-width: 100px; max-width: 100px; box-shadow: -6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); text-align: center; }
.sr   { right: 0; width: 110px; min-width: 110px; max-width: 110px; text-align: center; }
任務二：加上防彈級的背景色與 Z-index
為了防止中間的捲動內容在固定表頭底下穿幫（出現異常的灰色滑動區塊），請在 CSS 中加入以下強制覆寫：

CSS
/* 確保表頭有絕對的灰色背景與高層級 */
#inv-table th.sl, #inv-table th.sr-1, #inv-table th.sr {
    background-color: #F8F7FD !important;
    z-index: 30 !important;
}
/* 確保內容列有絕對的白色背景 */
#inv-table td.sl, #inv-table td.sr-1, #inv-table td.sr {
    background-color: white !important;
    z-index: 20 !important;
}
/* 處理 Hover 狀態 */
#inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sl, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr-1, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr {
    background-color: #FAFAFA !important;
}
任務三：清理 JS 中的 theadHtml 內聯樣式
既然 CSS 已經寫死了寬度與對齊，請將 renderInventoryTable 中的 theadHtml 簡化為：

JavaScript
let theadHtml = \`
  <th class="sl sl-0">品項</th>
  <th class="sl sl-1">庫存</th>
  <th class="sl sl-2">狀態</th>
  <th class="sl sl-3">待收貨</th>
\`;
// (中間省略...)
theadHtml += \`<th class="sr-1" style="padding:10px 8px">預計可撐天數</th>\`;
headHtml += \`<th class="sr" style="padding:10px 8px">期間估計用量 <span class="info-tip" data-tip="\${tooltipText}" style="font-size:14px">ℹ️</span></th>\`;
請套用上述所有 CSS 與 JS 修改，解決跑版與透明破圖的問題。」

**YOHOHO**（2026-05-10 19:08）：

瀏覽器已開啟。核心改動說明：

1. **`table-layout:fixed` + `width:max-content`** — 表格不再自動撐寬，每欄寬度由 CSS 決定，消除 sticky 定位點漂移的根本原因
2. **寬度三重鎖定** — 每個 `.sl-*` 和 `.sr-*` 同時設 `width` / `min-width` / `max-width`，排除 table-layout 自動重算的可能
3. **防彈背景色** — 用 `!important` 強制覆寫，`td.sl` 白色、`th.sl` 灰底、hover 灰色，確保任何情況下不透明
4. **th z-index:30 用 `!important`** — 防止中間滾動的事件欄表頭（z-index:15）在 sticky top 時覆蓋左右固定表頭

請載入測試資料後左右滑動，確認固定欄不再偏移、表頭不透明。

**ZY**（2026-05-10 19:12）：

「你上次的修改有幾個嚴重的排版瑕疵，特別是在 group-row（群組分類列）的 HTML 結構，以及右側陰影的設定上。請嚴格執行以下三項修正：

任務一：修正右側固定欄位 (Right Sticky) 的陰影
灰色陰影只需要在『預計可撐天數』的左側，最右邊的『期間估計用量』不需要左側陰影。
請修改 CSS 中的 .sr，將 box-shadow 移除：

CSS
.sr-1 { position:sticky; right:110px; z-index:20; width:100px; min-width:100px; max-width:100px; text-align:center; box-shadow:-6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
.sr   { position:sticky; right:0;     z-index:20; width:110px; min-width:110px; max-width:110px; text-align:center; box-shadow:none; } /* 移除了這裡的陰影 */
任務二：修復 Group Row（種類 Banner）右側破圖問題
在 renderInventoryTable 函數中生成 group-row 時，你使用了 colspan 跨越了整個右側，這導致右側固定欄位消失並破圖。
請將 group-row 的 HTML 生成邏輯嚴格改為：

JavaScript
if (groupKey && groupKey !== lastGroupKey) {
  lastGroupKey = groupKey;
  // 中間滾動區的跨欄數 (最少跨 1 欄)
  const midSpan = Math.max(cols.length, 1);
  tbodyRows.push(`<tr class="group-row">
    <td class="sl sl-0">${groupKey}</td>
    <td class="sl sl-1"></td>
    <td class="sl sl-2"></td>
    <td class="sl sl-3"></td>
    <td colspan="\${midSpan}"></td>
    >     <td class="sr-1"></td>
    <td class="sr"></td>
  </tr>`);
}
任務三：修正 Group Row 專屬的 Z-index 與背景色
為了確保 group-row 裡面的固定欄位保持統一的灰色 (#F1F5F9)，請在 CSS 中加上這段強制覆寫：

CSS
/* 確保表格所有 cell 使用 border-box，解決 1px 偏移問題 */
#inv-table th, #inv-table td { box-sizing: border-box; }

/* 確保 group-row 的固定欄位維持灰色背景與高度層級 */
#inv-table tr.group-row td.sl,
#inv-table tr.group-row td.sr-1,
#inv-table tr.group-row td.sr {
    background-color: #F1F5F9 !important;
    z-index: 25 !important;
}
請直接提供修改後的 <style> 片段與 renderInventoryTable 中的 HTML 生成片段。」

**ZY**（2026-05-10 21:48）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session continued from a prior context where Phase 1.5 (shared.js as Single Source of Truth) had been completed. The user confirmed Phase 1.5 was done and submitted three new business logic corrections:

**Request 1 — Fix QC tracking (shared.js):**
- `101`（磊柏）no longer needs QC → change `needQC: true` → `false`
- Going forward, only `102`（磊柏）and `102-mm`（明美）need QC tracking
- Confirm all QC logic reads dynamically from `needQC` in PRODUCTS (no hardcoded lists anywhere)

**Request 2 — Fix order.html brand separation and "undefined" title bug:**
- Add `brand` field to all PRODUCTS in shared.js: givf/gxtl/glue = `'Vitrolife'`, h5gt = `'LifeGlobal'`, all others = `null`
- Rewrite MEDIUM_CONFIG: only items with `brand != null`, grouped by brand (fixes undefined title in `buildMediumCard` which reads `group.brand`)
- Rewrite ORDER_CONFIG: only items with `brand === null`; 亞樸 must NOT appear in lower vendor section
- AOA/HEPES/Oil must NOT be in the upper MEDIUM_CONFIG section

**Request 3 — gupan.html 102 adjacency:**
- Keep f-102 and f-102-mm as two separate input fields
- Ensure they appear adjacent in STOCK_GROUPS for easy comparison during stocktaking
- Determined: **No code change needed** — both 102 and 102-mm are already adjacent in PRODUCTS array (lines 25-26) and both have `location:'冰箱'`, so they naturally appear together in the generated STOCK_GROUPS

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **shared.js Single Source of Truth (v2.1.0)**: PRODUCTS array as master product list with all attributes
- **`brand` field**: New field added to PRODUCTS; `'Vitrolife'`/`'LifeGlobal'` for branded culture media, `null` for all other items
- **MEDIUM_CONFIG vs ORDER_CONFIG separation**: MEDIUM_CONFIG groups by `brand` (upper section = premium branded media); ORDER_CONFIG groups by `vendor` filtering `brand === null` (lower section = general ordering)
- **Dynamic QC list**: `REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS = PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.needQC).map(p => p.id)` — no hardcoded IDs
- **`buildMediumCard()` in order.html**: Reads `group.brand` at line 445 — previous MEDIUM_CONFIG lacked `brand` field causing undefined
- **gupanId field**: Maps canonical IDs (e.g., `'givf'`) to pandian-history prefixed IDs (e.g., `'m-givf'`, `'f-102'`)
- **VENDOR_META**: Vendor-level contact/leadtime metadata kept separate from PRODUCTS

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

**`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\shared.js`** (v2.0.0 → v2.1.0)
- Added `brand` field to all 47 PRODUCTS entries
- Changed `101`'s `needQC: true` → `needQC: false`
- Updated version comment to v2.1.0
- REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS now results in `['102', '102-mm']`

Key new product entries:
```javascript
{ id:'givf', name:'G-IVF', vendor:'亞樸', unit:'瓶', group:'培養液', gtin:'07350025910550', brand:'Vitrolife', gupanId:'m-givf', target:2, reorderQty:12, bottleVol:60, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:false, location:'培養箱', orderNote:null },
{ id:'gxtl', name:'GxTL',  vendor:'亞樸', unit:'瓶', group:'培養液', gtin:'07350025910611', brand:'Vitrolife', gupanId:'m-gxtl', target:2, reorderQty:8,  bottleVol:30, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:false, location:'培養箱', orderNote:null },
{ id:'glue', name:'EmbryoGlue', vendor:'亞樸', unit:'瓶', group:'培養液', gtin:'07350025910048', brand:'Vitrolife', gupanId:'m-glue', target:2, reorderQty:8, bottleVol:10, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:false, location:'培養箱', orderNote:null },
{ id:'h5gt', name:'H5GT',  vendor:'弘優', unit:'瓶', group:'培養液', gtin:'00815965020426', brand:'LifeGlobal', gupanId:'m-h5gt', target:2, reorderQty:8, bottleVol:30, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:false, location:'培養箱', orderNote:null },
{ id:'aoa-ci', name:'AOA 弘優 CI', vendor:'弘優', unit:'瓶', group:'培養液', gtin:'04582231465118', brand:null, gupanId:'m-aoa-ci', ...},
{ id:'101', name:'101（磊柏）', vendor:'磊柏', unit:'套', group:'試劑', gtin:'04589700012170', brand:null, gupanId:'f-101', target:2, reorderQty:40, bottleVol:null, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:false, location:'冰箱', orderNote:'亦可向明美訂購' },
{ id:'102', name:'102（磊柏）', vendor:'磊柏', unit:'盒', group:'試劑', gtin:'04589700012200', brand:null, gupanId:'f-102', target:2, reorderQty:60, bottleVol:null, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:true,  location:'冰箱', orderNote:'月點料 · 亦可向明美訂購' },
{ id:'102-mm', name:'102（明美）', vendor:'明美', unit:'盒', group:'試劑', gtin:null, brand:null, gupanId:'f-102-mm', target:2, reorderQty:20, bottleVol:null, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:true, location:'冰箱', orderNote:'月點料 · 亦可向磊柏訂購' },
```

Derived constants at bottom of file:
```javascript
const REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS = PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.needQC).map(p => p.id);
// 結果：['102', '102-mm']

const PRODUCT_MAP = Object.fromEntries(PRODUCTS.map(p => [p.id, p]));

const GUPAN_MAP = Object.fromEntries(
  PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.gupanId).map(p => [p.gupanId, p])
);
```

**`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\order.html`** (lines ~260-310 rewritten)
- MEDIUM_CONFIG now groups by `brand` field (not vendor), fixes "undefined" title
- ORDER_CONFIG now skips `p.brand !== null` items (亞樸 no longer appears in lower section)

New MEDIUM_CONFIG:
```javascript
const MEDIUM_CONFIG = (() => {
  const brandMap = {};
  PRODUCTS.forEach(p => {
    if (!p.gupanId || !p.brand) return;
    if (!brandMap[p.brand]) brandMap[p.brand] = {
      brand:   p.brand,
      vendor:  p.vendor,
      contact: VENDOR_META[p.vendor]?.contact || '',
      items:   [],
    };
    brandMap[p.brand].items.push({
      itemId:     p.gupanId,
      orderId:    p.gupanId,
      name:       p.name,
      unit:       p.unit,
      target:     p.target    || 0,
      reorderQty: p.reorderQty,
      note:       p.orderNote || '',
    });
  });
  return Object.values(brandMap);
})();
```

New ORDER_CONFIG:
```javascript
const ORDER_CONFIG = (() => {
  const vendorMap = {};
  PRODUCTS.forEach(p => {
    if (!p.gupanId || p.brand !== null) return; // 跳過有品牌的品項
    const v = p.vendor;
    if (!VENDOR_META[v]) return;
    if (!vendorMap[v]) vendorMap[v] = [];
    vendorMap[v].push({
      itemId:     p.gupanId,
      orderId:    p.gupanId,
      name:       p.name,
      unit:       p.unit,
      target:     p.target    || 0,
      reorderQty: p.reorderQty,
      note:       p.orderNote || '',
    });
  });
  return Object.entries(vendorMap).map(([vendor, items]) => ({
    vendor,
    contact:  VENDOR_META[vendor].contact,
    leadtime: VENDOR_META[vendor].leadtime,
    items,
  }));
})();
```

**`C:\Users\User\.claude\plans\prd-beipan-html-gupan-html-order-html-j-vectorized-pancake.md`**
- Added new "Phase 1.5-R" section at the top documenting the 3 changes, root cause analysis, and verification steps

---

4. Errors and Fixes:

**Bug: "undefined" title in MEDIUM_CONFIG card header:**
- Root cause: `buildMediumCard()` at line 445 reads `${group.brand}`, but previous MEDIUM_CONFIG was derived from ORDER_CONFIG which only had `vendor` field (not `brand`)
- Fix: Rewrote MEDIUM_CONFIG to group by `brand` field and include `brand` property in each group object

**Bug: AOA/HEPES/Oil appearing in MEDIUM_CONFIG:**
- Root cause: Previous MEDIUM_CONFIG filtered by `group === '培養液'` which included all 8 培養液 items
- Fix: New MEDIUM_CONFIG filters by `p.brand !== null` — only Vitrolife (givf/gxtl/glue) and LifeGlobal (h5gt) qualify

**業務決策: 101 needQC was incorrectly true:**
- 101（磊柏）no longer needs QC in current workflow
- Fix: Changed `needQC: true` → `needQC: false` in shared.js; REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS automatically updates to `['102', '102-mm']`

---

5. Problem Solving:

**gupan.html 102 adjacency concern (resolved without code change):**
- User wanted 102（磊柏）and 102（明美）to appear adjacent in STOCK_GROUPS
- Analysis revealed: both have `location: '冰箱'`, and in PRODUCTS array they are on adjacent lines (102 at line 25, 102-mm at line 26)
- The STOCK_GROUPS generation iterates PRODUCTS in order, so they naturally appear adjacent within the 冰箱 group
- No code change required

**亞樸 disappearing from ORDER_CONFIG:**
- 亞樸's three products (givf, gxtl, glue) all have `brand: 'Vitrolife'`
- Since ORDER_CONFIG now skips `p.brand !== null`, all 亞樸 items are excluded
- 亞樸 has no `brand: null` products → 亞樸 correctly does NOT appear in ORDER_CONFIG lower section
- 弘優 still appears (has aoa-ci + all 耗材 with brand:null)

---

Phase 1.5 的重構完美成功！shared.js 的 PRODUCTS 與 REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS 都已經正確連動。現在請帶我正式進入 Phase 4D (QC 狀態追蹤) 的開發。

根據業務邏輯，102 試劑到貨後必須先進行測試。請幫我規劃並實作 Phase 4D，具體需求如下：

1. 進貨記錄 (jinhuo.html) 的自動標記與提醒：

在 batchSaveAll() 函數中，寫入 records 時，請檢查該品項是否在 REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS 陣列中。如果是，請在記錄中加上 qcStatus: 'pending' 屬性；如果不是，則設為 null 或 'not_required'。

請修正 batchSaveAll() 底部判斷是否觸發 show102Alert() 的邏輯，將原本寫死的 ['102','101'] 改為使用 REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS.includes(item.productId) 判斷。

2. 庫存總覽 (kucun.html) 的 KPI 卡片啟用：

請啟用畫面上方第四張原本標示為「Phase 4D 啟用」的灰色 KPI 卡片（改為紫色或符合設計的顏色）。

標題改為「🔬 待 QC」，數字顯示目前全系統有多少個批號（進貨紀錄）處於 qcStatus === 'pending'。

加入點擊篩選功能（setKpiFilter('qc')），點擊後主表格只顯示有待 QC 批號的品項。

3. 庫存總覽 (kucun.html) 抽屜 (Drawer) 的 QC 狀態與解鎖：

當點擊右側抽屜查看批號列表時，如果該批號的 qcStatus === 'pending'，請在批號旁邊顯示一個醒目的「⏳ 待 QC」Badge。

請在該批號旁邊（或抽屜內合適的位置）提供一個「✅ 通過 QC」的按鈕。點擊後將該筆進貨記錄的 qcStatus 改為 'approved'，並寫入一筆 kucun-changelog 異動日誌（例如：記錄「102 批號 XXXX 已通過 QC」及操作人）。

這是一個跨檔案的功能，請幫我分段給出 jinhuo.html 與 kucun.html 的具體修改指引與程式碼。準備好的話請直接開始！

**jinhuo.html（2 處）**
- `batchSaveAll()` 的 record 物件新增 `qcStatus: REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS.includes(item.productId) ? 'pending' : null`
- `has102` 判斷從寫死的 `['102','101']` 改為動態 `REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS.includes()`

**kucun.html（8 處，v2.3.0）**
- CSS：新增 `kpi-qc` 紫色樣式
- HTML：第 4 張 KPI 卡片從灰色停用改為紫色可點擊，`id="kpi-qc"`
- `calcKPIs()`：新增 `pendingQCCount`，讀取 `cachedData.jinhuo` 中 `qcStatus === 'pending'` 的筆數
- `renderKPIs()`：更新 `kpi-qc-num`，並在有待 QC 時顯示 KPI 區塊
- `setKpiFilter()`：加入 `'qc'` 到篩選陣列與 LABELS
- `renderInventoryTable()`：新增 `kpiFilter === 'qc'` 篩選分支
- `openDrawer()` 批號列：依 jinhuo records 的 `qcStatus` 顯示「⏳ 待QC」badge + 「✅ 通過」按鈕，或「✓ QC通過」標示
- 新增 `markQcPassed()` 函數：prompt 輸入操作人 → 更新 localStorage → 寫入 changelog → refresh

**驗證步驟**：載入測試資料後，DevTools 手動在一筆 `102` 記錄上加 `qcStatus: "pending"`，即可看到第 4 張卡片亮起、Drawer 顯示待 QC badge 與按鈕。

**ZY**（2026-05-10 22:23）：

Phase 4D 的 QC 功能測試一切正常！現在請帶我進入 Phase 5：流程閉環與體驗打磨。我們有三大任務需要立即執行，請提供 order.html、beipan.html 與 kucun.html 的修改指引：

任務 1：order.html 的三階段狀態機與儲存鎖定

邏輯重構：將訂貨流程改為「狀態 A (填寫中) → 狀態 B (預覽/通知) → 狀態 C (鎖定/存檔)」。

狀態 B (預覽)：點擊「預覽訂單」後進入此頁。此時 不可 寫入 localStorage。畫面需顯示「📱 LINE 通知廠商」與「← 返回修改」按鈕。

狀態 C (鎖定)：點擊右上角的「✅ 確認送出並存檔」後，執行真正的儲存（寫入 order-result 與 kucun-changelog），隨後清空所有輸入框，跳出 Toast 提示「訂單已鎖定」，並讓畫面回歸狀態 A 準備下一張新單。

任務 2：beipan.html 重要備註置頂（提升臨床安全）

在 beipan.html 讀取 gupan-confirmed 資料時，請檢查是否有填寫「備盤備註」。

如果有備註，請將內容顯示在頁面最上方的顯眼位置（例如放在目前的 gupan-import-banner 中），並加粗字體。

目的：讓備盤師一進頁面就能看到「練習盤」等重要指示，不需滾動到底部才發現。

任務 3：kucun.html 的「下鑽查詢」連動（點擊矩陣篩選日誌）

在 kucun.html 的庫存表格中，當使用者點擊中間 Timeline 區域的任何一個單元格（例如 5/1 盤點的那格）。

自動行為：

下方的更新紀錄區塊自動過濾「日期為 5/1」。

篩選器自動切換到對應的「來源」（例如：點擊盤點格就自動選「盤點」篩選器）。

頁面平滑滾動（Scroll into view）至下方的更新紀錄標題。

任務 4：版本控制與強制重新整理

在 shared.js 設定全域常數 const APP_VERSION = 'v2.3.0';。

在所有網頁載入時，檢查 localStorage 內的版本。若偵測到版本更新，自動跳出提示並引導使用者點擊「立即更新」，點擊後強制重新載入（location.reload(true)）以清除快取。

請先幫我從「任務 1：訂單流程閉環」開始，給我 order.html 需要修改的具體程式碼。

**Task 1 改動清單**

| 位置 | 改動 |
|------|------|
| Submit bar 按鈕 | `完成訂貨 →` → `預覽訂單 →`，`onclick="previewOrder()"` |
| Result view 標題 | `本次訂貨清單` → `訂單預覽` |
| Result view 按鈕 | 移除「開始新訂貨」；「← 修改訂貨」→「← 返回修改」；新增「✅ 確認送出並存檔」|
| `completeOrder()` 拆分 | 改為 `_collectOrders()`（共用資料收集）+ `previewOrder()`（State A→B，不寫 localStorage）+ `confirmOrder()`（State B→C→A，寫入、清空、Toast）|
| `showOrderResult()` | 新增 `mode` 參數，State B 顯示**琥珀色**預覽 banner，提示「確認後按右上角存檔」|
| Toast | 內建輕量實作（`div` 2.5 秒後消失），不依賴外部函數 |

**流程驗證步驟**：填寫訂購數量 → 「預覽訂單 →」→ 出現琥珀色 banner（尚未存檔）→ 「← 返回修改」可回頭修改 → 「✅ 確認送出並存檔」→ Toast 出現、畫面清空回到 State A。

**ZY**（2026-05-10 22:35）：

Task 1 的訂單閉環測試非常完美！預覽的琥珀色 Banner 和 Toast 提示讓流程變得非常清晰。

但在測試過程中，我抓到了一個嚴重的歷史邏輯漏洞，請幫我將其修正，並繼續執行任務 2 與任務 3：

【新增】修補訂貨頁面 (order.html) 邏輯漏洞：

問題：「待到貨」卡片右上角有一個「✓ 標記全數到貨」的捷徑按鈕（呼叫 closePendingOrder()）。這會繞過嚴謹的 jinhuo.html 收貨與 QC 流程，直接關閉訂單，導致沒有批號與簽收人紀錄。

修正：請在 order.html 的 buildIntransitCard() 中，徹底刪除那個 <button onclick="closePendingOrder()">✓ 標記全數到貨</button> 程式碼。並將下方的提示文字改為：「請前往『進貨記錄』頁面進行掃碼收貨，訂單狀態將自動更新。」

任務 2：beipan.html 重要備註置頂（提升臨床安全）

在 beipan.html 讀取 gupan-confirmed 資料 (loadGupanData()) 時，請檢查 localStorage 的 gupan-draft 或 gupan-confirmed 是否有填寫「備盤備註（gupan-note）」。

如果有備註（例如：練習盤x2），請將這段內容渲染在 beipan.html 最上方的 gupan-import-banner 裡面（或是下方新增一個顯眼的紫色區塊），加粗顯示。讓備盤師一進入畫面就絕對能看到。

任務 3：kucun.html 的「下鑽查詢」連動（點擊矩陣篩選日誌）

在 kucun.html 中，當點擊 Timeline 中間的任何一個事件格子（具有 ev-col 且內有數值的格子，包含進貨、備盤、盤點等）時。

觸發行為：

讀取該格子的「日期」與「來源(source)」。

自動將下方的「更新紀錄」日期區間 (#cl-date-from 與 #cl-date-to) 設為該日期。

自動將篩選器切換到對應的事件（呼叫 setCLFilter(source)）。

讓網頁平滑滾動 (scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'})) 到 #cl-table 的位置，方便使用者直接查看當天該品項的詳細異動。

請先給我 order.html 修補漏洞的代碼，接著提供 beipan.html（任務2）與 kucun.html（任務3）的修改指引！

**漏洞修補 — order.html**
- 移除「✓ 標記全數到貨」按鈕（`closePendingOrder()` 依然存在但不再曝光於 UI）
- 提示文字改為「請前往進貨記錄頁面進行掃碼收貨」，並附上 `<a>` 連結直達 jinhuo.html

**Task 2 — gupan.html + beipan.html**
- gupan.html：`confirmGupan()` 的 payload 新增 `note` 欄位，確保備盤備註寫入 `gupan-confirmed`
- beipan.html：`loadGupanData()` 讀取 `data.note`，若有值就在 `gupan-import-banner` **上方**動態插入紫色置頂區塊（`id="beipan-top-note"`），大字加粗顯示，附 📌 圖示

**Task 3 — kucun.html**
- ev-col 有數值的格子加 `cursor:pointer` + `title`（hover 提示日期）+ `onclick="drillDownChangelog(...)"` 
- `event.stopPropagation()` 防止觸發同列的 `openDrawer()`
- 新增 `drillDownChangelog(dateStr, filterKey)`：設定 `cl-date-from/to` → `setCLFilter()` → `scrollIntoView smooth`
- source 對 filter key 的映射：`jinhuo→jinhuo:receive`、`beipan→beipan`、`pandian→pandian`、`order→order`、`manual→manual:use`

**驗證備盤備註**：在 gupan.html 填寫備盤備註（如「練習盤x2」）→ 完成估盤確認 → 開啟 beipan.html → 最上方出現紫色區塊顯示「練習盤x2」。

**ZY**（2026-05-10 17:01）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

ZY (高任佑, IVF embryologist) is building a 培養液管理系統 (Culture Media Management System). This session continued Phase 4C-R: fixing the changelog accordion UI in kucun.html after the user identified problems with the v2.2.1 implementation.

**User's specific requests:**
- Fix 3 types of information redundancy: (1) Badge + event name text duplicate, (2) sub-row notes repeat action/date, (3) "盤點","進貨","手動記錄使用N瓶" still showing in notes
- Fix CSS alignment ("太平洋" empty space problem) — change from proportional flex to fixed-pixel grid
- 4-column layout: 品名(140px) | 批號(100px) | 消耗/數量(160px) | 備註(1fr auto-wrap)
- Integrate bottlesOpened into Col3: "使用 15.1mL（開 1 瓶）"
- Col4 (備註) must auto word-wrap (not clip), with `align-items:start` for grid container
- Read `bottlesOpened` directly from changelog entry (NOT calculate it — it's already stored by beipan.html's submitBeipan())
- Desired per-source formats:
  - 備盤: 品名｜批號｜使用?mL（開?瓶）｜備註+開封後到期日
  - 進貨: 品名｜批號｜+N瓶｜效期｜到貨狀態
  - 盤點: 品名｜N瓶｜操作人
  - 訂貨: 品名｜訂購N瓶(灰底)｜廠商
  - 作廢/修改: 品名｜批號｜數量｜原因/明細

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **kucun-changelog**: localStorage key storing all inventory events with schema: `{id, ts, source, action, productId, productName, lotNumber, expiryDate, openExpiryDate, qtyDelta, unit, bottlesOpened, operator, note}`
- **Accordion changelog UI**: Groups entries by `ts|source` key, collapsed rows + expandable detail rows
- **CSS Grid fixed columns**: `grid-template-columns: 140px 100px 160px 1fr` with `align-items:start`
- **Column wrapping rules**: col1-3 = `white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis`; col4 = `white-space:normal; word-break:break-word; line-height:1.6`
- **bottlesOpened**: Stored directly in changelog by `beipan.html`'s `submitBeipan()` during submission — NOT to be calculated/inferred
- **cleanNote()**: Removes trailing `（YYYY-MM-DD）` or `(YYYY-MM-DD)` from note strings
- **Note cleanup per source**: 盤點 strips "盤點：" prefix; jinhuo/receive strips bare "進貨"; manual strips "手動記錄使用N瓶"
- **qtyDelta for beipan**: Negative number (consumed mL), use `Math.abs()` to display as positive "使用 Xmml"
- **Old format vs new format**: Old beipan `qty` = remaining total (positive); New `qtyDelta` = consumed (negative). Always use `e.qtyDelta ?? e.qty`

---

**CSS changes (line ~145) — ALREADY APPLIED ✓:**
```css
/* Changed FROM: */
.cl-expand-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1.5fr 1.5fr 1fr 3fr; gap:0 6px; align-items:baseline; ... }
.cl-expand-row.order-row { background:#F8FAFF; border-radius:4px; color:#94A3B8; }

/* Changed TO: */
.cl-expand-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:140px 100px 160px 1fr; gap:0 8px; align-items:start; padding:5px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #F1F5F9; font-size:12.5px; }
.cl-expand-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
.cl-expand-row.order-row { background:#F8FAFF; border-radius:4px; }
/* col1-3：不換行，超長省略 */
.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(1),.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(2),.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(3) { white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; }
/* col4（備註）：自動換行 */
.cl-expand-row > span:nth-child(4) { white-space:normal; word-break:break-word; line-height:1.6; }
```

**`buildExpandRows()` function (~line 1234) — NEEDS UPDATE (edit FAILED):**

Current state is 5-column version using `expandRow()` helper. Needs to be replaced with:
```javascript
function cleanNote(note) {
  if (!note) return '';
  return note.replace(/[（(]\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}[）)]\s*$/, '').trim();
}

function expandRow4(c1, c2, c3, c4, extraClass) {
  const cls = extraClass ? `cl-expand-row ${extraClass}` : 'cl-expand-row';
  return `<div class="${cls}">
    <span class="font-medium text-slate-700 text-xs">${c1}</span>
    <span class="font-mono text-xs text-slate-400">${c2 || ''}</span>
    <span class="text-xs">${c3 || ''}</span>
    <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">${c4 || ''}</span>
  </div>`;
}

function buildExpandRows(entries, src) {
  return entries.map(e => {
    const p    = PRODUCT_MAP[e.productId];
    const name = p?.name || e.productName || e.productId || '—';
    const qty  = e.qtyDelta ?? e.qty;
    const unit = e.unit || '瓶';
    const lot  = e.lotNumber || '';
    const baseNote = cleanNote(e.note);

    if (src === 'beipan') {
      const consumed = qty != null ? Math.abs(parseFloat(qty)) : null;
      const consumedStr = consumed != null ? `使用 ${consumed.toFixed(1)}mL` : '';
      const openedStr = (e.bottlesOpened > 0) ? `（開 ${e.bottlesOpened} 瓶）` : '';
      const col3 = consumedStr
        ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${consumedStr}${openedStr}</span>` : '';
      const openExpStr = e.openExpiryDate ? `開封後到期 ${e.openExpiryDate}` : '';
      const col4 = [baseNote, openExpStr].filter(Boolean).join('；') || '—';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, col4);
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'receive') {
      const col3 = qty > 0 ? `<span class="text-emerald-600 font-semibold">+${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      const expStr = e.expiryDate ? `效期 ${e.expiryDate}` : '';
      const noteClean = baseNote.replace(/^進貨$/, '').trim();
      const col4 = [expStr, noteClean].filter(Boolean).join('｜') || '—';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, col4);
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'void') {
      const col3 = qty != null ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, baseNote || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'jinhuo' && e.action === 'edit') {
      return expandRow4(name, lot, '—', baseNote || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'pandian') {
      const col3 = qty != null ? `<span class="text-slate-600 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
      const operator = e.operator || baseNote.replace(/^盤點[：:]\s*/, '').replace(/^盤點$/, '').trim();
      return expandRow4(name, '', col3, operator || '—');
    }

    if (src === 'order') {
      const col3 = qty > 0 ? `訂購 ${qty} ${unit}` : '—';
      const vendor = e.vendor || (baseNote.match(/廠商[：:]\s*([^；（\s]+)/)?.[1] || '');
      return expandRow4(
        `<span class="text-slate-400">${name}</span>`,
        '',
        `<span class="text-slate-400 font-medium">${col3}</span>`,
        `<span class="text-slate-400">${vendor || '—'}</span>`,
        'order-row'
      );
    }

    // manual / fallback
    const col3 = qty > 0 ? `<span class="text-emerald-600 font-semibold">+${qty} ${unit}</span>`
               : qty < 0 ? `<span class="text-red-500 font-semibold">${qty} ${unit}</span>` : '';
    const manualNote = baseNote
      .replace(/手動記錄(?:使用)?\s*[\d.]+\s*[瓶mL]+/gi, '')
      .replace(/^[;；,，\s]+|[;；,，\s]+$/g, '').trim();
    return expandRow4(name, lot, col3, manualNote || '—');
  }).join('');
}
```

**ZY**（2026-05-10 17:28）：

[📄 ZY 在 IDE 開啟了 kucun.html]

「你把『庫存快照』跟『異動日誌』的 CSV 匯出邏輯搞混了！目前右上角的『匯出庫存快照』按鈕，匯出的內容居然是底下的交易明細，這是不對的。同時，盤點的備註也有資訊重複的問題。

任務一：徹底拆分『庫存快照』與『異動日誌』的 CSV 匯出功能

修復『匯出庫存快照』 (Export Snapshot)：

維持右上角的按鈕，但請重寫 exportCSV() 函數。

這個函數必須去抓取上方庫存總表的當前狀態（讀取 products 與 productInfoCache 計算出的結果）。

CSV 欄位必須是：品項分類、品項名稱、廠商、目前庫存(庫存數+單位)、狀態(如：危急/充足)、待收貨數量、預計可撐天數、期間估計用量。

檔名維持：台北胚胎室_庫存快照_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv。

新增『匯出區間日誌』 (Export Transaction Log)：

請在下方「更新紀錄 (Changelog)」區塊的『日期區間選擇器』右側，新增一個按鈕 <button class="cl-quick-btn">匯出區間日誌</button>。

建立一個新的函數 exportChangelogCSV()。

將原本用來匯出 log 的舊 exportCSV() 邏輯移到這裡，並且必須套用畫面上已選的日期區間篩選 (cl-date-from, cl-date-to) 以及來源篩選 (clFilter)。

檔名格式：台北胚胎室_異動日誌_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv。

任務二：擴充 Changelog 篩選器條件 (Filter)
目前的篩選按鈕種類不夠。請更新 HTML 的篩選按鈕列與 setCLFilter 的邏輯，使其支援同時過濾特定的 action 或 source。請改為以下按鈕：

全部 (不過濾)

進貨 (source === 'jinhuo' 且 action === 'receive')

備盤 (source === 'beipan')

盤點 (source === 'pandian')

訂貨 (source === 'order')

手動使用 (source === 'manual' 且 action === 'use')

異常/作廢 (action === 'void' || action === 'discard')

修改/調整 (action === 'edit' || action === 'adjust')

任務三：消除盤點 (pandian) 的備註贅字
在 buildExpandRows 處理 src === 'pandian' 時，目前 col4 會把操作人名字印出來（例如：盤點：曾OO），但這與主列右側的操作人欄位重複了。

請修改邏輯：將 noteClean 裡面類似 盤點：曾OO 或 盤點：高任佑 的字眼用 Regex 清除（例如 replace(/盤點[：:]\s*[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z]+/g, '')）。

如果清除後為空字串，col4 請直接顯示 —。

請提供修改後的 exportCSV, 新增的 exportChangelogCSV, 更新後的 setCLFilter 以及對應的 HTML 和 buildExpandRows 程式碼。」

💡 提示詞背後的用意：
強制拆分： 我讓 AI 明確知道總表的 CSV 只能印「欄位狀態（庫存、待收貨）」，而下方的 CSV 才能印「歷史過程」。

連動篩選器： 特別交代 AI 在匯出「異動日誌」時，必須套用你選好的日期區間，這樣你就不會每次都載下一大包幾千筆的資料了。

擴充篩選按鈕： 將你提到的「作廢、修改、廢棄」透過 action 的屬性整合進了篩選列，以後查帳會非常方便。

**ZY**（2026-05-10 18:59）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session continued the 培養液管理系統 (Culture Media Management System) project. Key requests in this session:

a) **Fix `buildExpandRows()` rewrite** (carried over from previous session where Edit failed): Replace 5-column grid with 4-column grid (`expandRow()` → `expandRow4()`), with per-source note cleanup.

b) **Fix `✓` in inventory table cells**: Replace hardcoded checkmarks for beipan/pandian with real values — pandian: `= N 瓶` (green), beipan: `-N 瓶` if bottlesOpened > 0, gray dot if 0; jinhuo: `+N` (blue); order: `N` (gray, no sign).

c) **Fix beipan note cleanup regex**: User provided correct regex — only remove `扣除 XXXmL[...];` prefix, preserve `剩餘 XmL，未開 N 瓶`; use ` ｜ ` separator.

d) **Three major tasks** (CSV split + filter expansion + pandian note fix):
   - Split `exportCSV()` into snapshot vs. changelog versions
   - Add "匯出區間日誌" button with `exportChangelogCSV()` applying current filters
   - Expand filter buttons from 5 to 8 (adding 訂貨, 手動使用, 異常/作廢, 修改/調整)
   - Fix pandian col4 removing "盤點：XXX" operator name redundancy

e) **Phase 4D plan**: QC Status Tracking — with user corrections: REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS=['102'] only; use `action:'qc_pass'`; `prompt()` for operator; add KPI filter linkage.

f) **Architecture refactor (shared.js)**: Paused Phase 4D to first unify PRODUCTS across 5 HTML files. Key: add `102（明美）` as `id:'102-mm'`; add `gupanId` field; maintain backward compat. To be done in new session.

g) **Restore 預計可撐天數 column**: User discovered the Days of Inventory column was removed; requested it be added back to the right-side sticky area.

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **kucun-changelog schema**: `{id, ts, source, action, productId, productName, lotNumber, expiryDate, openExpiryDate, qtyDelta, unit, bottlesOpened, operator, note}`
- **4-column CSS grid for changelog expand rows**: `grid-template-columns: 140px 100px 160px 1fr; align-items:start`
- **matchesCLFilter(e, f)**: Composite filter using `source:action` format; `:void` matches void+discard; `:edit` matches edit+adjust
- **productInfoCache**: Pre-calculated per-product info from `calcProductInfo()`
- **calcDoI()**: Days of Inventory = stockNum / (estUsage / periodDays)
- **calcEstUsage()**: pandian-history based usage estimation
- **PRODUCT_MAP**: `Object.fromEntries(PRODUCTS.map(p => [p.id, p]))` for fast lookup
- **gupanId field**: Maps canonical IDs to gupan.html's prefixed IDs (f-, m-, c1-, etc.) for pandian-history compatibility
- **Sticky right columns**: `.sr-1` at `right:110px`, `.sr` at `right:0`; z-index 20/30 for td/th
- **localStorage keys**: `jinhuo-records`, `pandian-history`, `pandian-result`, `beipan-result`, `kucun-changelog`, `order-result`

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (v2.2.1 — primary file)
  
  **CSS additions (lines ~64-70)**:
  ```css
  .sr-1 { position:sticky; right:110px; z-index:20; background-color:white; box-shadow:-6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
  #inv-table th.sr-1 { background-color:#F8F7FD; z-index:30; }
  #inv-table tbody tr:hover .sr-1 { background-color:#FAFAFA; }
  .sr { position:sticky; right:0; z-index:20; background-color:white; box-shadow:-1px 0 0 0 #E2E4F4; }
  ```

  **buildExpandRows() — 4-column version (lines ~1242-1370)**:
  ```javascript
  function expandRow4(c1, c2, c3, c4, extraClass) {
    const cls = extraClass ? `cl-expand-row ${extraClass}` : 'cl-expand-row';
    return `<div class="${cls}">
      <span class="font-medium text-slate-700 text-xs">${c1}</span>
      <span class="font-mono text-xs text-slate-400">${c2 || ''}</span>
      <span class="text-xs">${c3 || ''}</span>
      <span class="text-xs text-slate-400">${c4 || ''}</span>
    </div>`;
  }
  ```

  **beipan note cleanup (in buildExpandRows)**:
  ```javascript
  let noteClean = baseNote.replace(/扣除[\d.]+mL[^；]*[；;]\s*/g, '').trim();
  const col4 = [noteClean, openExpStr].filter(Boolean).join(' ｜ ') || '—';
  ```

  **pandian note cleanup (in buildExpandRows)**:
  ```javascript
  const noteClean = baseNote
    .replace(/盤點[：:]\s*[一-龥a-zA-Z\s]+/g, '')
    .replace(/^[;；,，\s]+|[;；,，\s]+$/g, '').trim();
  return expandRow4(name, '', col3, noteClean || '—');
  ```

  **Cell rendering in renderInventoryTable (qtyHtml logic)**:
  ```javascript
  const S = 'font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px';
  if (g.source === 'pandian') {
    qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:#059669">= ${fmtNum(pandianQty)} 瓶</div>`;
  } else if (g.source === 'beipan') {
    if (totalOpened > 0) qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:#DC2626">-${totalOpened} 瓶</div>`;
    // 0 → gray dot (default)
  } else if (g.source === 'order') {
    qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:#94A3B8">${fmtNum(Math.abs(totalQty))}</div>`;
  } else if (g.source === 'jinhuo') {
    const sign = totalQty > 0 ? '+' : '-';
    const clr = totalQty > 0 ? '#2563EB' : '#DC2626';
    qtyHtml = `<div style="${S};color:${clr}">${sign}${fmtNum(Math.abs(totalQty))}</div>`;
  } else { // manual/fallback: same as jinhuo format }
  ```

  **matchesCLFilter() function**:
  ```javascript
  function matchesCLFilter(e, f) {
    if (!f) return true;
    const [src, act] = f.split(':');
    const srcOk = !src || e.source === src;
    let actOk = true;
    if (act) {
      if (act === 'void') actOk = e.action === 'void' || e.action === 'discard';
      else if (act === 'edit') actOk = e.action === 'edit' || e.action === 'adjust';
      else actOk = e.action === act;
    }
    return srcOk && actOk;
  }
  ```

  **exportCSV() — now exports inventory snapshot**:
  - Reads `PRODUCTS` + `productInfoCache`
  - Columns: 品項分類, 品項名稱, 廠商, 目前庫存, 狀態, 待收貨數量, 預計可撐天數, 期間估計用量
  - Filename: `台北胚胎室_庫存快照_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv`

  **exportChangelogCSV() — new function**:
  - Applies `clFilter` via `matchesCLFilter()` + date range filters
  - Same columns as old exportCSV (日期, 時間, 來源, 操作, 品項, 批號, 效期, 數量, 單位, 操作人, 備註)
  - Filename: `台北胚胎室_異動日誌_YYYYMMDD_HHmm.csv`

  **Filter buttons HTML (8 buttons)**:
  ```html
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f="" onclick="setCLFilter('')">全部</button>
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f="jinhuo:receive" onclick="setCLFilter('jinhuo:receive')">進貨</button>
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f="beipan" onclick="setCLFilter('beipan')">備盤</button>
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f="pandian" onclick="setCLFilter('pandian')">盤點</button>
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f="order" onclick="setCLFilter('order')">訂貨</button>
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f="manual:use" onclick="setCLFilter('manual:use')">手動使用</button>
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f=":void" onclick="setCLFilter(':void')">異常/作廢</button>
  <button class="cl-filter-btn" data-f=":edit" onclick="setCLFilter(':edit')">修改/調整</button>
  ```

  **tbody row with 預計可撐天數 restored**:

  ```javascript
  const doi = calcDoI(p.id, data);
  const doiCell = doi !== null
    ? `<div class="font-semibold text-slate-700 text-sm tabular">≈ ${doi} 天</div>`
    : `<span class="text-slate-300 text-sm">—</span>`;
  // in tbodyRows.push:
  <td class="sr-1" style="text-align:center;padding:10px 8px;min-width:90px;max-width:90px">${doiCell}</td>
  <td class="sr" style="text-align:center;padding:10px 8px;min-width:110px;max-width:110px">${estCell}</td>
  ```

---

4. Errors and Fixes:

- **Edit failed "String to replace not found"** (carried from previous session): The `buildExpandRows()` function text in file didn't match what was specified. Fix: Read exact lines 1237-1311 first, then used exact content as `old_string`. Resolved successfully.

- **"使用 107.0mL" showing wrong value**: Old localStorage data from previous session. Not a code bug — user needed to click "載入測試資料" to refresh. Explained and resolved.

- **beipan note producing `扣除 12.0mL（）；剩餘 18.0mL，；`**: The multi-step regex was too aggressive (removing `剩餘...未開...` parts). User provided correct single-regex fix that only removes the `扣除 XXXmL[...];` prefix.

---

5. Problem Solving:

- **ID inconsistency across 5 HTML files**: Core architectural problem. Solved with plan to add `gupanId` field to canonical PRODUCTS, keeping backward compat for localStorage keys.
- **102（明美）missing from 4 of 5 pages**: Will be added as `id:'102-mm'` in shared.js.
- **Filter granularity**: Composite `source:action` filter key solves need to filter both by source (beipan) and by action (void, edit) independently.
- **CSV confusion**: Right-click "匯出庫存快照" was exporting changelog data. Fixed by fully separating the two export functions.

**ZY**（2026-05-10 19:07）：

「目前 kucun.html 的庫存總表在滑動時，發生了嚴重的『固定欄位 (Sticky) 偏移重疊』以及『表頭背景透明導致破圖』的問題。這肇因於 table 的自動撐寬特性，以及 z-index/背景色沒有嚴格覆蓋。

請嚴格按照以下指示，全面覆寫 CSS 區塊並清理 HTML 結構：

任務一：強制表格佈局與左右欄位精確寬度
請在 <style> 中更新 #inv-table 與所有的 .sl、.sr 寬度與定位：

CSS
/* 1. 強制表格不准自動撐寬 */
#inv-table { border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; width: max-content; min-width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; }

/* 2. 左側固定欄位 (寬度總和: 140+80+80=300) */
.sl-0 { left: 0; width: 140px; min-width: 140px; max-width: 140px; }
.sl-1 { left: 140px; width: 80px; min-width: 80px; max-width: 80px; text-align: center; }
.sl-2 { left: 220px; width: 80px; min-width: 80px; max-width: 80px; text-align: center; }
.sl-3 { left: 300px; width: 90px; min-width: 90px; max-width: 90px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }

/* 3. 右側固定欄位 (寬度總和: 100+110=210) */
.sr-1 { right: 110px; width: 100px; min-width: 100px; max-width: 100px; box-shadow: -6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); text-align: center; }
.sr   { right: 0; width: 110px; min-width: 110px; max-width: 110px; text-align: center; }
任務二：加上防彈級的背景色與 Z-index
為了防止中間的捲動內容在固定表頭底下穿幫（出現異常的灰色滑動區塊），請在 CSS 中加入以下強制覆寫：

CSS
/* 確保表頭有絕對的灰色背景與高層級 */
#inv-table th.sl, #inv-table th.sr-1, #inv-table th.sr {
    background-color: #F8F7FD !important;
    z-index: 30 !important;
}
/* 確保內容列有絕對的白色背景 */
#inv-table td.sl, #inv-table td.sr-1, #inv-table td.sr {
    background-color: white !important;
    z-index: 20 !important;
}
/* 處理 Hover 狀態 */
#inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sl, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr-1, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr {
    background-color: #FAFAFA !important;
}
任務三：清理 JS 中的 theadHtml 內聯樣式
既然 CSS 已經寫死了寬度與對齊，請將 renderInventoryTable 中的 theadHtml 簡化為：

JavaScript
let theadHtml = \`
  <th class="sl sl-0">品項</th>
  <th class="sl sl-1">庫存</th>
  <th class="sl sl-2">狀態</th>
  <th class="sl sl-3">待收貨</th>
\`;
// (中間省略...)
theadHtml += \`<th class="sr-1" style="padding:10px 8px">預計可撐天數</th>\`;
headHtml += \`<th class="sr" style="padding:10px 8px">期間估計用量 <span class="info-tip" data-tip="\${tooltipText}" style="font-size:14px">ℹ️</span></th>\`;
請套用上述所有 CSS 與 JS 修改，解決跑版與透明破圖的問題。」

**YOHOHO**（2026-05-10 19:08）：

瀏覽器已開啟。核心改動說明：

1. **`table-layout:fixed` + `width:max-content`** — 表格不再自動撐寬，每欄寬度由 CSS 決定，消除 sticky 定位點漂移的根本原因
2. **寬度三重鎖定** — 每個 `.sl-*` 和 `.sr-*` 同時設 `width` / `min-width` / `max-width`，排除 table-layout 自動重算的可能
3. **防彈背景色** — 用 `!important` 強制覆寫，`td.sl` 白色、`th.sl` 灰底、hover 灰色，確保任何情況下不透明
4. **th z-index:30 用 `!important`** — 防止中間滾動的事件欄表頭（z-index:15）在 sticky top 時覆蓋左右固定表頭

請載入測試資料後左右滑動，確認固定欄不再偏移、表頭不透明。

「你上次的修改有幾個嚴重的排版瑕疵，特別是在 group-row（群組分類列）的 HTML 結構，以及右側陰影的設定上。請嚴格執行以下三項修正：

任務一：修正右側固定欄位 (Right Sticky) 的陰影
灰色陰影只需要在『預計可撐天數』的左側，最右邊的『期間估計用量』不需要左側陰影。
請修改 CSS 中的 .sr，將 box-shadow 移除：

CSS
.sr-1 { position:sticky; right:110px; z-index:20; width:100px; min-width:100px; max-width:100px; text-align:center; box-shadow:-6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }

任務二：修復 Group Row（種類 Banner）右側破圖問題
在 renderInventoryTable 函數中生成 group-row 時，你使用了 colspan 跨越了整個右側，這導致右側固定欄位消失並破圖。
請將 group-row 的 HTML 生成邏輯嚴格改為：

JavaScript
if (groupKey && groupKey !== lastGroupKey) {
  lastGroupKey = groupKey;
  // 中間滾動區的跨欄數 (最少跨 1 欄)
  const midSpan = Math.max(cols.length, 1);
  tbodyRows.push(`<tr class="group-row">
    <td class="sl sl-0">${groupKey}</td>
    <td class="sl sl-1"></td>
    <td class="sl sl-2"></td>
    <td class="sl sl-3"></td>
    <td colspan="\${midSpan}"></td>
    >     <td class="sr-1"></td>
    <td class="sr"></td>
  </tr>`);
}
任務三：修正 Group Row 專屬的 Z-index 與背景色
為了確保 group-row 裡面的固定欄位保持統一的灰色 (#F1F5F9)，請在 CSS 中加上這段強制覆寫：

CSS
/* 確保表格所有 cell 使用 border-box，解決 1px 偏移問題 */
#inv-table th, #inv-table td { box-sizing: border-box; }

/* 確保 group-row 的固定欄位維持灰色背景與高度層級 */
#inv-table tr.group-row td.sl,
#inv-table tr.group-row td.sr-1,
#inv-table tr.group-row td.sr {
    background-color: #F1F5F9 !important;
    z-index: 25 !important;
}
請直接提供修改後的 <style> 片段與 renderInventoryTable 中的 HTML 生成片段。」

**ZY**（2026-05-10 21:09）：

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

This session had three main phases of work:

**A) kucun.html Sticky Column Layout Fixes (3 rounds)**
- Round 1: Recalibrate left/right sticky column widths and `left`/`right` CSS offsets to match actual pixel sums
- Round 2: Comprehensive overhaul — add `table-layout:fixed`, `width:max-content`, bulletproof `!important` backgrounds and z-index, clean up theadHtml inline styles
- Round 3: Remove shadow from `.sr` (only `.sr-1` keeps shadow), fix group-row HTML (was collapsing right sticky cells into colspan), add `box-sizing:border-box`, add group-row sticky cell z-index

**B) Manual Log Modal Operator Field**
- Add `操作人 *` required input next to `原因分類` using grid-cols-2 layout in #log-modal
- Add validation in submitLog(), write operator to changelog entry, clear on close

**C) Phase 1.5 Architecture Refactor (Plan + Full Execution)**
- Extend shared.js to v2.0.0 as Single Source of Truth
- 47 PRODUCTS entries each get 8 new fields: gupanId, target, reorderQty, bottleVol, openExpiryDays, needQC, location, orderNote
- Fix beipan.html ID conflict (embryoglue → glue)
- Update kucun.html pandian/order lookups to use gupanId
- Replace gupan.html STOCK_GROUPS hardcode with dynamic generation
- Replace order.html ORDER_CONFIG/MEDIUM_CONFIG hardcode with dynamic generation
- User decisions confirmed: `needed` stays in beipan.html; 102(磊柏)=gupanId:'f-102', 102(明美)=gupanId:'f-102-mm'

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:

- **CSS Sticky Columns**: `position:sticky`, `z-index` layering, `table-layout:fixed`, `width:max-content`, `!important` overrides for background/z-index
- **Mirror Scrollbar**: `.inv-mirror` div with margin-left/right matching exact sticky column widths
- **Group Row Sticky Fix**: group-row must have explicit `<td class="sr-1">` and `<td class="sr">` rather than collapsed colspan
- **shared.js Single Source of Truth**: PRODUCTS array as canonical product master, PRODUCT_MAP, GUPAN_MAP, REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS all derived from it
- **gupanId field**: Maps canonical product IDs (e.g., `givf`) to gupan.html/pandian-history prefixed IDs (e.g., `m-givf`, `f-102`, `c1-3w`)
- **Dynamic config generation**: ORDER_CONFIG, MEDIUM_CONFIG, STOCK_GROUPS all generated at runtime from PRODUCTS
- **VENDOR_META**: Vendor-level contact/leadtime data kept separate from PRODUCTS (not product-level attributes)
- **localStorage keys**: `kucun-changelog`, `pandian-history`, `pandian-result`, `beipan-result`, `jinhuo-records`, `order-result`
- **ID Conflict Resolution**: 102(磊柏)=`f-102`, 102(明美)=`f-102-mm` (new; previously both mapped to `f-102`)

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`e:\ZYoooClaude\generated-pages\kucun.html`** (v2.2.1)
  - Multiple CSS sticky column fixes across 3 rounds
  - Final CSS sticky section:
    ```css
    #inv-table { border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; width:max-content; min-width:100%; table-layout:fixed; }
    .sl { position:sticky; z-index:20; }
    .sl-0 { left:0;    width:140px; min-width:140px; max-width:140px; }
    .sl-1 { left:140px; width:80px;  min-width:80px;  max-width:80px;  text-align:center; }
    .sl-2 { left:220px; width:80px;  min-width:80px;  max-width:80px;  text-align:center; }
    .sl-3 { left:300px; width:90px;  min-width:90px;  max-width:90px;  text-align:center; box-shadow:6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
    .sr-1 { position:sticky; right:110px; z-index:20; width:100px; min-width:100px; max-width:100px; text-align:center; box-shadow:-6px 0 10px -2px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
    .sr   { position:sticky; right:0;     z-index:20; width:110px; min-width:110px; max-width:110px; text-align:center; box-shadow:none; }
    #inv-table th, #inv-table td { box-sizing:border-box; }
    #inv-table th.sl, #inv-table th.sr-1, #inv-table th.sr { background-color:#F8F7FD !important; z-index:30 !important; }
    #inv-table td.sl, #inv-table td.sr-1, #inv-table td.sr { background-color:white !important; z-index:20 !important; }
    #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sl, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr-1, #inv-table tbody tr:hover td.sr { background-color:#FAFAFA !important; }
    #inv-table tr.group-row td.sl, #inv-table tr.group-row td.sr-1, #inv-table tr.group-row td.sr { background-color:#F1F5F9 !important; z-index:25 !important; }
    ```

    ```javascript
    { id:'102', name:'102（磊柏）', vendor:'磊柏', unit:'盒', group:'試劑', gtin:'04589700012200', gupanId:'f-102', target:2, reorderQty:60, bottleVol:null, openExpiryDays:null, needQC:true, location:'冰箱', orderNote:'月點料 · 亦可向明美訂購' },
    ```

    ```javascript
    const REQUIRE_QC_ITEMS = PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.needQC).map(p => p.id); // ['101','102','102-mm']
    const GUPAN_MAP = Object.fromEntries(PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.gupanId).map(p => [p.gupanId, p]));
    ```
